celtic_cross_below_en: Underneath, there is a soulful need to sacrifice an old ego-driven desire to make room for something higher. A hidden part of you knows that this surrender is the only path to true freedom.
celtic_cross_past_en: A period of high activity or a struggle for control has recently wound down, leaving you in this quiet space. The momentum of the past is fading to make way for this necessary interval.
celtic_cross_future_en: Soon, a shift in your internal landscape will occur, making a difficult decision feel surprisingly easy. You are moving toward a phase where 'non-action' produces the most significant results.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are showing up as the observer, carefully weighing your options and refusing to be rushed by external pressures. You are in a 'wait and see' mode, protecting your inner peace.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The world around you may seem demanding or impatient, perhaps not understanding why you aren't acting. You are surrounded by an environment that values speed, making your stillness look like an anomaly.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope this sacrifice of time leads to a massive breakthrough, yet you fear that you are simply wasting days and that the 'aha' moment will never arrive.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you continue to embrace this pause, you will likely achieve a radical breakthrough in consciousness. The situation will resolve not through force, but because you finally saw it for what it truly is.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Stop trying to untie the knots with your defenses; let the situation hang until it loosens on its own.

tarot_imply_en: transformation, rebirth, endings, letting go, transition
standalone_past_en: A chapter has definitely closed. You’ve gone through a painful stripping away of the old, but that ending was necessary to clear the ground for who you are becoming.
standalone_present_en: You are shedding your old skin, and it might feel raw. Don't try to glue the dead parts back on; let them fall away so the new version of you can breathe.
standalone_future_en: A totally new dawn is coming. Your life is about to flip in a way that makes the past unrecognizable, bringing opportunities for a rebirth you can't even imagine yet.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you faced a necessary ending that closed a significant chapter, stripping away what was no longer vital and forcing you to grow through the process of release.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are in a powerful transition, shedding an old version of yourself; let go gracefully, for this empty space is clearing the way for a major rebirth.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, a completely new life phase awaits that looks nothing like your past; embrace this transformation, for the sun is rising on a much healthier reality.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past endings allow for current transformation, clearing the slate for a brighter, more powerful rebirth in the future.
love_past_en: An old relationship ended, or a past dynamic within a relationship has died.
love_present_en: If a relationship is toxic, it's time to let go, or undergo a massive behavioral overhaul.
love_future_en: Old loves will fade to make way for better ones, or the relationship will evolve into a new form.
love_reading_single_en: You are being asked to bury the ghosts of past lovers or outdated 'types' that no longer serve you; clear the energy fully to invite a transformative new connection.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship is ready to shed its old skin; release outdated dynamics or grudges now, and you can evolve together into a deeper, more resilient union.
career_past_en: You resigned, lost a job, or switched career paths abruptly.
career_present_en: Projects may be cancelled or restructuring is happening. Accept reality and look for new opportunities.
career_future_en: You will get a completely different job or start a brand new business.
finance_past_en: You suffered a major financial loss, or a debt cycle has finally ended.
finance_present_en: Old income streams may dry up; find new channels instead of relying on the same old source.
finance_future_en: Financial status will improve significantly after passing through the crisis.
action_prompt_en: Sweep away the emotional clutter! Cut dead things out of your life so your tree of life can sprout new leaves.
reflection_question_en: What in your life has 'expired', yet you insist on keeping it?
affirmation_en: I release the past to welcome a bright future.
hook_en: Every ending makes room for something new. This chapter is closing so the next can begin.
ritual_2min_en: Write down bad habits or painful memories. Tear the paper into tiny pieces, throw them away, and say, 'Goodbye, old things.'
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
If your life were a book, what is the title of the chapter that is ending?
What change do you fear the most?
What new thing do you want to invite into your life?
keywords_light: transformation, new beginning, end of cycle, liberation, cleansing
keywords_shadow: resistance to change, stagnation, fear of letting go, decay, grief
image_alt_en: A hooded grim reaper cat with a bone-white skull face and glowing eyes rides a pale spectral horse, holding a black flag with a white rose emblem amid wilted lilies and spirit lights.
illustration_prompt_en: A tall grim reaper cat is the main focus, seated high on the back of a single pale spectral horse. The cat’s body is wrapped in a heavy black hooded cloak, its bone-white cat skull face and cold glowing eyes clearly visible at the center of the image. With one paw it holds a long black banner pole, the tattered flag unfurled above and behind it, showing a white rose emblem. The other paw rests on a long silver scythe angled downward along the side of the horse. The horse walks slowly forward through a field of wilted lilies, fallen petals, and scattered stone skulls, its form slightly ghostly but secondary to the cat rider. Tiny blue-white spirit flames hover near the ground. In the distance, a faint red-gold dawn glows at the horizon beneath a huge pale moon and thin halo rays. The entire scene is framed in a richly detailed gold Art Nouveau border with curling vines, thorns, and subtle skeletal motifs, dark and solemn but quietly transformative in the MeowTarot cat tarot illustration style.
meta_description_en: Death Tarot meaning by MeowTarot: It's not the end, but a transformation. Embrace rebirth, letting go, and new beginnings.
career_reading_single_en: This role or career path has reached its natural conclusion. Don't cling to a sinking ship; accept the ending gracefully so you can find a position where you truly feel alive again.
finance_reading_single_en: Stop pouring resources into a dead investment or habit. Cut your losses now; this clearing of debt or expense is necessary to prepare the soil for your future abundance.
self_reading_single_en: You are molting. The version of you that fit into the old box doesn't exist anymore. Allow yourself to be messy and vulnerable during this transformation; it's just growing pains.
family_reading_single_en: Family dynamics are shifting permanently. Someone may be moving out or moving on. Let old traditions go to make space for new, healthier connections within your home.
travel_reading_single_en: A journey is ending, or you are moving permanently. This isn't a vacation; it's a one-way ticket to a new chapter. Leave the heavy baggage behind.
health_reading_single_en: A time to let go of heavy energy and habits that no longer serve you. Listen to your body's rhythm and allow yourself a quiet space to reset.
self_past_en: You survived a major personal crisis that stripped you to the bone, leaving only what was real.
self_present_en: You are in the void between who you were and who you will be; it feels empty, but it is fertile.
self_future_en: A completely reinvented self will emerge, stronger and wiser, like a phoenix (or a person) rising from the ashes.
family_past_en: A separation or significant change in the household structure occurred, altering the family map.
family_present_en: You are adjusting to a new normal within the family; letting the dust settle before building bridges.
family_future_en: New members, a new home, or a totally new family environment will bring unexpected joy.
travel_past_en: You left a place behind for good, closing that door securely.
travel_present_en: A transition period of packing up or moving between places; you are in transit.
travel_future_en: You will reach a destination that offers a blank slate for a fresh start.
health_past_en: You recently navigated a period that required a significant pause and dedicated rest to regain your inner balance.
health_present_en: Your body is currently in a quiet phase of renewal. Prioritizing rest and gentle pacing can help you recharge your natural energy.
health_future_en: A sense of renewed vitality is on the horizon. You may find yourself feeling more refreshed and better aligned with your body’s needs.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are standing at a major threshold where an old cycle is definitively ending. The air is thick with transition as you clear away the debris of a phase that has served its purpose and is now ready to depart.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is the painful friction of holding onto a ghost; something is dead, yet you are still trying to breathe life into it. This resistance to letting go is what creates the true suffering here.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you recognize that change is inevitable and necessary. You are likely planning your exit or visualizing what life looks like after this major clearing, focusing on the logic of the transition.
celtic_cross_below_en: Deep down, there is a primal fear of the void and the unknown. This root energy is fueled by old patterns of grief or a survival instinct that views any ending as a total loss rather than a renewal.
celtic_cross_past_en: The decay of this situation started some time ago; the recent past was marked by the slow fading of relevance and the realization that the old structure was no longer sustainable.
celtic_cross_future_en: Next comes the blank slate phase—a period of quiet after the storm where you will find yourself in a new, uncarved space. Expect a profound sense of relief once the final cord is cut.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are currently in 'transformee' mode—stripping away the unnecessary and perhaps grieving what was lost. You are showing up with a somber but necessary honesty about what needs to go.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The environment is providing the external pressure for this end—perhaps a job ending, a lease up, or a social circle shifting. The world around you is forcing your hand to close this chapter.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for a total rebirth and a clean break, but you fear the 'messy' middle part of the transformation where you have no identity and no clear direction.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If the pattern continues, this situation will be completely unrecognizable in a few months. A radical transformation is the likely destination, leading to a life that is much lighter and more authentic.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Don't try to repair what was meant to be composted; let it fall so new seeds can finally breathe.

tarot_imply_en: balance, compromise, healing, patience, perfect blending
standalone_past_en: You saved yourself by finding the middle ground. After navigating recent conflicts, you learned that patience and compromise were your strongest weapons.
standalone_present_en: Life asks you to be an alchemist today. Don't rush or force things; gently blend your options. The magic happens in the mix, not at the extremes.
standalone_future_en: Everything is settling into a perfect rhythm. Your health and heart will heal, and conflicts will dissolve into a peaceful, refreshing balance.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past lessons in patience enable your current balancing act, which is the key to unlocking a future full of peace and true healing.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you navigated difficulties by finding the middle ground, learning that patience and compromise were your best tools for survival.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, life asks you to avoid extremes and gently blend opposing forces; finding your center is the key to handling today's challenges.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, your patience will pay off as life settles into a steady rhythm of deep healing and sustainable peace.
love_past_en: You and your partner learned to tune into each other or calmly sustained the relationship.
love_present_en: A good love is like warm water—soothing. Be patient and listen to each other more.
love_future_en: The relationship will be smooth and deeply supportive, a love that heals both hearts.
love_reading_single_en: This is a time to heal old wounds before rushing into something new; patience will attract a partner who brings peace rather than drama.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship thrives on compromise right now; listen deeply and blend your differences gently to create a harmonious union.
career_past_en: You had to mediate or juggle multiple tasks without losing your balance.
career_present_en: Don't overwork until you burnout. Work-Life Balance isn't just a buzzword; it's a must-do now.
career_future_en: Work will settle into a smooth rhythm. Everything will proceed sustainably—steady, not flashy.
finance_past_en: You improved your spending habits to be more balanced, neither too strict nor too loose.
finance_present_en: Manage cash flow carefully. Balance income and expenses perfectly; not the time to go all in.
finance_future_en: Financial status will be very stable. You will have enough to live comfortably without shortage.
action_prompt_en: Slow down... breathe deep, and find the middle path. No need to rush; everything has its timing.
reflection_question_en: Which ingredient in your life is currently 'too much' or 'too little'?
affirmation_en: I create balance and harmony in every step of my life.
hook_en: Not too hot, not too cold... finding the sweet spot is the ultimate life skill.
ritual_2min_en: Brew a warm drink you like (tea or milk). Sip it slowly, feeling the perfect temperature soothing your throat to absorb the energy of balance.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What do you need to be more patient about?
How can you add a pinch of joy to your day today?
If life is a flavor right now, what is it, and what is missing?
keywords_light: balance, moderation, patience, purpose, healing
keywords_shadow: imbalance, excess, lack of long-term vision, impatience, conflict

self_past_en: You have healed from a period of burnout or emotional extremes by learning to be gentler with yourself.
self_present_en: You are currently finding your center. It is a time to integrate all parts of yourself—light and shadow—into one harmonious being.
self_future_en: You will achieve a state of inner wholeness. Your mind and spirit will feel calm, clear, and perfectly aligned.
family_past_en: You often played the role of the mediator, smoothing over conflicts to keep the family together.
family_present_en: Patience is required at home. Adjust your expectations and try to blend your needs with theirs.
family_future_en: Harmony will be restored. The household will operate with a quiet understanding and mutual respect.
travel_past_en: A past journey helped you heal or gave you a new perspective on how to live a balanced life.
travel_present_en: This is a good time for a retreat or a slow vacation. Avoid extreme sports; choose scenic routes instead.
travel_future_en: You will experience a seamless blend of cultures or environments that feels incredibly refreshing.
health_past_en: You have previously learned the value of moderation and pacing yourself to maintain your natural energy.
health_present_en: This is a gentle time to prioritize hydration and light stretching. Tuning into your body's rhythm can bring a sense of ease.
health_future_en: A more stable sense of vitality is likely to emerge as you find your flow. You may find it easier to sustain your energy through consistent self-care.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are in a period of alchemy and calibration, carefully blending different areas of your life into a harmonious whole. There is a sense of patient moderation and emotional steadying currently active in your field.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is the sheer effort required to maintain balance; you may feel frustrated by how slow this 'middle path' feels. The friction comes from the urge to swing to extremes when the situation demands subtle blending.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are striving for peace and a sustainable lifestyle. You are focused on cooperation, health, or finding a compromise that satisfies everyone involved without causing a burnout.
celtic_cross_below_en: Underneath the surface, there is a deep soul-thirst for healing and integration. This situation is being driven by an ancestral need to find inner peace and to mend fragments of yourself that have been at war.
celtic_cross_past_en: You recently emerged from a period of volatility or emotional chaos. That 'storm' has provided the very ingredients you are now learning to mix with more wisdom and grace.
celtic_cross_future_en: The next phase involves a steady 'flow' state where things begin to click into place without much effort. You are approaching a period of increased vitality and productive cooperation with others.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are showing up as the mediator or the calm center in the storm. You are behaving with maturity, refusing to take sides, and acting as the bridge between conflicting forces.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The environment requires a diplomat's touch; you are surrounded by people or circumstances that need careful handling and a balanced perspective to avoid a total collapse of order.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for perfect harmony and a 'just right' life, but you fear that by being so moderate, you are becoming boring or losing the passion that makes you feel alive.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you maintain this calibration, the situation will likely settle into a beautiful, sustainable rhythm. You will achieve a state of 'functional magic' where internal peace leads to external success.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Patience isn't just waiting; it's keeping a good attitude while the mix settles.

standalone_present_en: Right now, it feels like the universe is hitting the pause button. Old problems are circling back like a bad sequel, forcing you to deal with them before the wheel spins forward again.
standalone_future_en: This bad luck is just a temporary glitch, but it’s a warning. Stop fighting the current; if you don't adapt to the changing winds, this cycle will just keep repeating.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you tried to control the uncontrollable or resisted necessary changes, which trapped you in a loop of repetitive challenges that you are likely ready to break.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, things feel stuck or out of sync, as if the universe is hitting 'pause' to force you to resolve lingering issues before moving forward.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, patience is key; forcing progress now will only cause frustration, so wait for the tide to turn before making your next big move.
reading_summary_preview_en: Clinging to the past has left you feeling stuck in the present, facing unexpected obstacles. If you accept change and stop fighting the current, the future will slowly unravel into a better path.
love_past_en: You cycled through bad relationships or went back to an ex knowing it wouldn't work.
love_present_en: Love is skipping like a broken record; timing is off, or external factors are blocking the romance.
love_future_en: Beware of making the same mistake twice in love, or simply wait a bit longer for the right timing.
love_reading_single_en: You might feel like you are attracting the same type of partners or hitting the same walls; use this pause to break that pattern before dating again.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship may face external stressors or bad timing right now; focus on riding out the storm together rather than blaming each other for the turbulence.
career_past_en: You missed a golden opportunity due to hesitation or had bad luck with a restructuring.

career_future_en: Unwanted changes may occur, but if you wait out the storm, you will see a way out.
finance_past_en: You lost a lump sum due to unexpected events or mistimed investments.

finance_future_en: Beware of emergency expenses coming out of nowhere; always have a backup plan.

reflection_question_en: What lesson is the universe trying to teach you repeatedly, but you pretend not to hear?
affirmation_en: I learn from obstacles, and I am flexible in every situation.
hook_en: Sometimes destiny plays a prank... try to keep your sense of humor.
ritual_2min_en: Clean a clock or something that spins in your house (fan, wheels) to clear stagnation. Then spin it clockwise 3 times with new intention.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What repetitive event are you most tired of right now?
How are you responsible for keeping this wheel spinning in place?
What is a new method you will try to break this cycle?

keywords_shadow: Bad luck, Resistance, Delays, Misfortune, Karma

tarot_imply_en: Injustice, Avoiding accountability, Bias, Dishonesty, Imbalance
standalone_past_en: You might have made a choice based on bias, or tried to sweep a mistake under the rug. That lingering guilt is the heavy baggage you’re still carrying today.
standalone_present_en: The scales are tipped. You might feel the world is treating you unfairly right now, but ask yourself honestly: are you refusing to take responsibility for your own part in this mess?
standalone_future_en: Dodging the truth only buys you a little time, not freedom. If you don't own up to your actions soon, the consequences will be far messier than if you just faced them now.
reading_summary_preview_en: Issues stemming from past irresponsibility or unfairness are unbalancing your present. If you don't face the situation with honesty, the future price to pay will be much higher.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, a choice made with bias or a refusal to face facts created an imbalance that you are likely still carrying as guilt or unresolved tension.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, things feel unfair or out of balance; you are being challenged to stop denying the truth and take accountability before the situation gets messier.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, running from the truth will only complicate matters, so facing the consequences now is the only way to avoid a harsher outcome later.
love_past_en: There were secrets, or an unequal relationship where one side clearly took advantage of the other.
love_present_en: Beware of lies about to be exposed, or feeling that your partner is treating you unfairly.
love_future_en: A breakup without mutual agreement, or a messy and prolonged divorce settlement.
love_reading_single_en: You may be feeling guarded due to past unfair treatment, but be careful not to project old suspicions onto new people or ignore red flags of inequality.
love_reading_couple_en: Hidden resentments or lack of transparency may be causing an imbalance in your connection; restoring honesty is essential to prevent deeper conflict.
career_past_en: You were blamed for something you didn't do, or conversely, you threw a colleague under the bus.
career_present_en: Watch out for office politics, backstabbing, or signing contracts with hidden unfair clauses.
career_future_en: Non-transparent decisions will backfire, or you will be held liable for damages.

finance_future_en: You might face fines, legal fees, or pay compensation for past mistakes.

reflection_question_en: Are you blaming others just to make yourself feel better?
affirmation_en: I am brave enough to admit my own mistakes.
hook_en: The truth never dies... but it might bite you if you're not careful!
ritual_2min_en: Write down what you feel guilty about or are hiding. Tear the paper into tiny pieces to release the negative energy, then intend to start fresh with honesty.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:

Have you ever been 'unfair' to yourself?
keywords_light: Forgiveness, Accountability, Restoring balance, Second chance, Learning from mistakes
keywords_shadow: Injustice, Dishonesty, Corruption, Unfairness, Denial

tarot_imply_en: Useless struggle, Refusal to let go, Misplaced sacrifice, Stagnation, Indecision
standalone_past_en: You spent way too long sacrificing for people who didn't appreciate it. You were struggling and kicking when you should have just cut the rope.
standalone_present_en: You are tired of waiting and trying to force a shortcut, but it's like a finger trap—the more you pull, the tighter it gets. Stop fighting reality; the timing isn't right yet.
standalone_future_en: If you refuse to change your perspective, you'll remain suspended in this frustration. Letting go isn't losing; it's the only way to get your feet back on the ground.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you exhausted yourself trying to save a situation that was already lost, sacrificing your well-being for those who did not appreciate it.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, you are fighting against reality and feeling frustrated by delays; trying to force a shortcut will only tighten the knots around you.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, if you refuse to change your perspective, you risk staying stuck in this loop indefinitely; letting go is the only way to regain your freedom.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past clinging and struggling have left you feeling trapped and desperate to escape in the present. Without acceptance and letting go, the future holds further delays and disappointment.
love_reading_single_en: You might be wasting energy waiting for someone who isn't coming back or changing; it is time to stop playing the victim and reclaim your own happiness.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship may be suffering from a martyr complex where one person gives too much and resents it; stop suffering in silence and address the imbalance honestly.
love_past_en: You stayed in a toxic relationship just because of sunk costs, or played the martyr until you were drained.
love_present_en: Stop kidding yourself! If they don't value you, back off. Aimless waiting only prolongs the pain.
love_future_en: You might waste time on the wrong person or have to face the hard truth that this relationship is dead.
career_past_en: You worked hard with no results to show for it, or your projects were shelved until you lost heart.
career_present_en: Work is stalled due to hesitation, or your resistance to organizational change is making your life difficult.
career_future_en: Beware of missed opportunities due to indecision, or being forced to accept unfavorable terms.
finance_past_en: Money was tied up in bad investments due to lack of research, or you lost money for nothing.
finance_present_en: Don't expect profits right now. Money may arrive late, or you might have to cut losses to save your capital.
finance_future_en: You must sacrifice a part to save the whole (cut loss) rather than stubbornly losing everything.
action_prompt_en: Stop complaining, stop blaming the universe, and get up and do something, no matter how small!
reflection_question_en: Are you playing the 'victim' to get attention?
affirmation_en: I release the past and move forward with confidence.
hook_en: Hang there too long and blood will rush to your head... come down now.
ritual_2min_en: Shake your hands and feet vigorously to get blood flowing. Shout 'Enough!' (loudly or internally) to break the loop of thoughts, then go drink a glass of cold water.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What do you complain about most these days?
Why won't you let go of this problem?
If you woke up tomorrow and the problem was gone, what would you do first?
keywords_light: Movement, Letting go, Sacrifice, New solutions, Action
keywords_shadow: Stalling, Martyrdom, Useless sacrifice, Indecision, Resistance

self_past_en: You spent a long time waiting for permission from others to change your life or shift your mindset.
self_present_en: You are currently grappling with the urge to break free from self-imposed limits and old habits.
self_future_en: A new sense of freedom awaits as you learn to value your own time and stop playing the martyr.
family_past_en: There may have been a period of unnecessary sacrifice for family expectations that left you feeling drained.
family_present_en: Current tensions might stem from a refusal to let go of an old family argument or a different perspective.
family_future_en: Resolution could come when everyone agrees to stop the blame game and focus on a fresh start.
travel_past_en: Past journeys might have felt like they were more work than play, or were delayed by indecision.
travel_present_en: You might feel stuck in one place, but this is a good time to refine your plans without rushing.
travel_future_en: Future travel may require flexibility, as schedules might shift; going with the flow could be your best bet.

health_future_en: Listening more closely to your physical limits could lead to a more balanced and rhythmic lifestyle.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are currently caught in a cycle of 'busy-ness' that leads nowhere, resisting the very pause that would bring clarity. There is a sense of stalling, as if you’re trying to run while your hands are still tied.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The friction here is your refusal to let go of control. You are wriggling against the inevitable, and this resistance is creating more exhaustion than the situation itself.
celtic_cross_above_en: You are consciously trying to force a breakthrough or find a logical escape, believing that if you just think harder, you can bypass the need for sacrifice.
celtic_cross_below_en: Deep down, there is a fear of looking foolish or failing if you stop moving. Your ego is clinging to an old perspective because it feels safer than the unknown 'void' of surrender.
celtic_cross_past_en: A period of procrastination or a sacrifice that felt hollow has led you here. You may have given up something recently but didn't gain the insight you expected.
celtic_cross_future_en: The next phase involves a mounting pressure to finally be still. You will soon face a moment where your current tactics simply stop working, forcing a change in viewpoint.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are showing up as the restless soul, acting out of impatience and perhaps ignoring the intuitive whispers that tell you to just wait.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The people or circumstances around you are pushing for immediate results, making it even harder for you to find the quiet space you actually need.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for a quick resolution that requires zero discomfort, yet you fear that if you actually surrender, you’ll be stuck in this limbo forever.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If this resistance continues, the situation will likely end in a forced halt. The universe may step in to stop you if you refuse to stop yourself, leading to a much needed but uncomfortable epiphany.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Stop kicking; the more you struggle, the tighter the knots become—try exhaling and just being for a moment.

tarot_imply_en: Resistance to change, Clinging to the past, Inability to move on, Stagnation, Delayed rebirth
standalone_past_en: You tried to perform CPR on a situation that was already cold. Refusing to say goodbye has only left you haunted by the ghosts of what used to be.
standalone_present_en: Why are you hugging a skeleton? You are fighting a change that is inevitable, clinging to a painful comfort zone because the unknown feels scarier.
standalone_future_en: Change will happen whether you consent to it or not. If you don't let go voluntarily, life will pry your fingers open, and that will hurt much more.
reading_summary_preview_en: Clinging to the past has left you stuck in a limbo in the present. Denying the death (of the old) blocks your future rebirth, keeping your life stagnant.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you resisted a necessary ending, choosing to carry the heavy weight of expired situations rather than facing the void of the unknown.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are fighting the natural flow of change, clinging to a painful status quo instead of stepping into the new; this resistance is the source of your exhaustion.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, refusing to let go will make the inevitable transition much harder; release your grip voluntarily now to avoid being dragged by fate later.
love_reading_single_en: You may be emotionally unavailable because you are still hung up on an ex or past hurt; you must clear this dead energy before a new connection can truly breathe.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship may feel stagnant or like it has run its course, yet fear keeps you holding on; ignoring this decay will only prolong the unhappiness.
love_past_en: You insisted on staying with someone you knew wasn't right, or repeatedly went back to an ex, like reading the same book expecting a different ending.
love_present_en: A 'zombie' relationship that is dead but still walking because you fear being alone, or you simply cannot move on from an ex.
love_future_en: If you don't cut ties, you will waste your life on the wrong person and block the chance of meeting true love.
career_past_en: You endured a hated job for far too long or rejected good opportunities out of fear of starting over.
career_present_en: Work is tedious and stagnant, yet you dare not quit. You feel trapped in a loop with no exit.
career_future_en: Change will be forced upon you (like being pushed out) if you don't choose your own path early on.
finance_past_en: You tried to save a failing business or wasted money repairing old things that weren't worth it.
finance_present_en: Chronic financial issues persist because you refuse to change spending habits or stick to outdated income methods.
finance_future_en: Financial crisis may last longer than expected if you refuse to amputate (debts/expenses) to save your life.
action_prompt_en: Accept the truth that it is 'over.' Stop performing CPR on something that will never come back to life.
reflection_question_en: Which do you fear more: the pain of ending, or the pain of staying the same forever?
affirmation_en: I dare to let go, so my hands are free to receive the new.
hook_en: Zombies aren't cute like cats... stop nursing a dead relationship.
ritual_2min_en: Rearrange your home or bedroom. Move at least one piece of furniture to shift the Feng Shui and stimulate the stagnant energy to flow again.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
Why do you find change so scary?
List 3 benefits of 'starting over' that you forgot about.
If you don't let this go, what will your life look like in a year?
keywords_light: Acceptance, Gentle transition, Slow change, Healing grief, Awakening
keywords_shadow: Stagnation, Fear of change, Holding on, Decay, Unfinished business

health_reading_single_en: Your energy might feel a bit heavy or stagnant lately. Gently listening to your body’s need for rest and moving at your own pace could help you feel more balanced.
self_past_en: In the past, you may have clung to an old identity or habit long after it stopped serving you.
self_present_en: Right now, you might be resisting a necessary personal transformation because the 'old you' feels safer.
self_future_en: Eventually, letting go of what no longer fits will lead to a beautiful and much-needed inner rebirth.
family_past_en: Past family issues might have been kept on 'life support' instead of being allowed to resolve naturally.
family_present_en: You might be feeling a bit stuck in a family pattern that needs to evolve for everyone's happiness.
family_future_en: Accepting that family roles change over time could eventually bring a deeper, more honest connection.
travel_past_en: A previous trip might have felt unfulfilling because you were mentally still stuck at home or in the past.
travel_present_en: You may feel hesitant to explore new places right now, preferring the comfort of the familiar.
travel_future_en: When you are ready to release your baggage, travel could become a powerful way to rediscover yourself.

health_future_en: If you find small ways to refresh your routine, your vitality could begin to feel more renewed and light.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are standing at a threshold, but your hands are glued to the floor of the past. The energy is heavy with a transition that is being delayed or resisted.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is the 'zombie' energy—keeping something alive that no longer has a pulse. You are pouring energy into a dead end, which prevents the new from arriving.
celtic_cross_above_en: Mentally, you are focusing on ways to fix, revive, or justify the current state, trying to rationalize why you aren't ready to let go just yet.
celtic_cross_below_en: At the root, there is a profound fear of the 'void'—the empty space that follows an ending. You’d rather deal with a painful known than a peaceful unknown.
celtic_cross_past_en: A significant ending or change recently began, but it wasn't fully processed or accepted, leaving a lingering ghost in your current path.
celtic_cross_future_en: The pressure to transform will only intensify. Soon, the cracks in the old structure will become too wide to ignore, forcing a clean break whether you feel ready or not.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are acting as the guardian of a fading world, clinging to old habits or relationships out of a misguided sense of loyalty or fear of change.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The environment feels stagnant or decaying, perhaps surrounded by people who are also afraid of progress, reinforcing your desire to stay put.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for a miraculous recovery of the past, but you are terrified that you are wasting your life by waiting for something that will never return.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you continue to resist the ending, the situation will lead to prolonged stagnation and missed opportunities. The 'death' will still happen, but it will be a slow decay instead of a swift rebirth.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Stop trying to perform CPR on a ghost; let the ending happen so you can finally see the sunrise.

tarot_imply_en: Imbalance, Excess, Impatience, Discord, Lack of moderation
standalone_past_en: You lived life at full volume—either zero or one hundred, with no middle ground. That lack of moderation fried your circuits and threw your system off balance.
standalone_present_en: You are trying to mix oil and water, or pouring until your cup overflows. You're doing too much, feeling scattered, and frantically trying to keep it all together.
standalone_future_en: If you keep pushing at this pace, you are going to crash. Forceful mixing results in explosions, not harmony. Step back and stabilize before something breaks.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past imbalances have left you feeling turbulent and out of control in the present. If you don't retune your rhythm soon, the future risks health issues or severe conflict.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you lived at extremes—either too rigid or too chaotic—which threw your entire system completely out of balance.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, you are trying to do too much or force things that don't fit; pause before this imbalance leads to a spill.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, continued excess will lead to burnout or conflict; you must compromise and rest now to avoid a crash later.
love_past_en: You gave too much to love until you suffered, or endured a relationship filled with arguments due to incompatibility.
love_present_en: Emotions are volatile, hot and cold. The relationship is fragile due to impatience and a refusal to listen.
love_future_en: Beware of the relationship collapsing due to extremism or trying too hard to change the other person.
love_reading_single_en: You may be feeling emotionally volatile or impatient right now; focus on stabilizing your own energy before trying to mix it with someone else's.
love_reading_couple_en: Tension is rising due to impatience or an unwillingness to compromise; you must stop trying to force your partner to change and listen instead.
career_past_en: Worked so hard you sacrificed your health, or had issues with colleagues because you couldn't adapt.
career_present_en: Overwhelmed with work, poor prioritization, or team atmosphere is simmering with disagreement.
career_future_en: Without rest, you will burn out, or projects will fail due to poor coordination.
finance_past_en: You spent money recklessly or got hurt by investing in excessively high-risk ventures.
finance_present_en: Income and expenses are unbalanced; money is leaking. Beware of debt caused by fleeting desires.
finance_future_en: You might have to juggle finances frantically or lose a lump sum due to negligence.
action_prompt_en: Stop pouring! Stop adding! Step back before the glass breaks. Focus on taking care of yourself immediately.
reflection_question_en: Are you addicted to something (work, food, emotion) to the point it's hurting you?
affirmation_en: I release the excess and return to center.
hook_en: Mix randomly and it might explode... life needs the right recipe.
ritual_2min_en: Pour water into two cups: one hot, one cold. Touch them to feel the difference. Mix them into a third cup to make warm water. Sip slowly to internalize moderation.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What are you doing 'too much' of right now that is harmful?
What inner conflict haven't you resolved yet?
What is your body trying to tell you?

keywords_shadow: Excess, Imbalance, Discord, Impatience, Extremism

celtic_cross_environment_en: The environment around you is demanding and chaotic, adding to your internal noise and making it difficult to find the 'quiet middle' you crave.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for instant peace and perfect alignment, but you fear that you’ve lost your ability to be moderate and that life will always feel this frantic.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If this pace continues, burnout or a total breakdown of communication is likely. The current trajectory leads toward further fragmentation until you decide to pour slowly and listen more.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Stop trying to boil the ocean; adjust one small element at a time and watch the chemistry change naturally.

tarot_imply_en: attachment, addiction, obsession, bondage, shadow self
standalone_past_en: You were caught in a toxic loop—maybe a bad habit or a draining relationship—that felt impossible to quit. You knew it wasn't good for you, but the hook was deep.
standalone_present_en: You feel trapped, but look closely: the chains are actually loose. You aren't stuck because you have to be; you're stuck because you haven't decided to walk away yet.
standalone_future_en: If you don't cut the cord, you'll sink deeper. But if you dare to face your shadow self now, true freedom and power are waiting for you on the other side.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you were caught in a cycle of toxic habits or relationships, feeling bound by choices that drained you but were surprisingly hard to leave.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you may feel trapped by a situation or temptation, but look closely—the chains are loose, and you have the power to walk away whenever you choose.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, you will be challenged to confront your shadow side; breaking free from these old patterns is the only path to genuine independence.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past bonds make you feel stuck in the present, but the truth is you hold the key to freedom, ready to release yourself into a future free from shadows.
love_past_en: A relationship filled with passion but lacking sincerity, or a love that made you lose your sense of self.
love_present_en: Beware of toxic dynamics or addiction to drama. Ask yourself: is this love or just obsession?
love_future_en: You may encounter intense but empty sexual attraction, or face a choice to stay or leave.
love_reading_single_en: You may feel a magnetic pull toward someone exciting but complicated; ensure you aren't mistaking intense physical chemistry or obsession for a healthy, long-term connection.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship might feel suffocating due to jealousy or control; it is vital to address these toxic patterns now to restore freedom and trust between you.
career_past_en: You stuck with a job you hated just for the money or endured a dictatorial boss.
career_present_en: Feeling like a slave to the wage; overworked but can't quit due to debt, or tempted by unethical shortcuts.
career_future_en: Beware of getting involved in shady business or signing a contract that binds you too tight.
finance_past_en: You struggled with heavy debt from overspending or gambling.
finance_present_en: Greed takes over! You crave unnecessary things blindly. Watch out for credit card debt traps.
finance_future_en: If you don't stop splurging, you might carry a heavy financial burden for a long time.
action_prompt_en: Stop lying to yourself saying 'I can't.' Shake off those mental chains and walk away now!
reflection_question_en: Which chain did you willingly put around your own neck?
affirmation_en: I am free from all chains and bondages.
hook_en: The devil isn't always scary... sometimes it's just that treat you can't say no to.
ritual_2min_en: Tie a black thread loosely around your wrist, representing what you want to quit. Meditate on courage, then snap or cut the thread to declare freedom.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What is one bad habit you know you should quit but can't?
What fear keeps you trapped in the same old box?
If you were free from all burdens tomorrow, what would you do first?
keywords_light: freedom, overcoming addiction, breaking chains, shadow work, sexuality
keywords_shadow: addiction, materialism, toxic relationships, powerlessness, depression
image_alt_en: A charismatic black cat with curved horns sitting on a dark throne, holding loose ribbons attached to two smaller, mesmerized kittens.
illustration_prompt_en: A charismatic black cat with curved ram horns sitting on a dark obsidian throne, holding gold ribbons loosely attached to two smaller mesmerizing kittens, dark cave background with torchlight, art nouveau style, velvet textures, mysterious.
meta_description_en: The Devil Tarot meaning by MeowTarot: Face your shadow self and addictions. Discover how to break free from toxic cycles and materialism.
career_reading_single_en: You might feel chained to a job or obsessed with status. Remember, even the most expensive golden collar is still a collar. Work to live, don't live to work.
finance_reading_single_en: Be careful of materialism or 'retail therapy.' Buying more toys won't fill the void if you are actually lonely. Watch out for hidden fees or debt traps.
self_reading_single_en: It is time to look in the mirror and face your shadow side. Are you holding yourself back with fear or bad habits? You hold the key to your own cage.
family_reading_single_en: Family dynamics might feel suffocating or controlling right now. It is okay to set boundaries. Love should make you feel safe, not trapped.
travel_reading_single_en: You might feel tempted to escape, but verify the details first. A 'dream vacation' could turn into a tourist trap if you aren't careful with your choices.
health_reading_single_en: Take a moment to notice your daily routines and how they affect your energy. Finding a gentle balance between activity and rest can help you feel more grounded.
self_past_en: You allowed fear or a negative self-image to control your actions, staying in the shadows rather than stepping into your light.
self_present_en: You are confronting your inner demons. It is uncomfortable, but realizing you have the power to say 'no' to your impulses is the first step.
self_future_en: Total liberation is possible. By mastering your desires rather than letting them master you, you will find a powerful new version of yourself.
family_past_en: Family obligations felt like heavy chains; perhaps traditions or expectations forced you to hide who you really were.
family_present_en: You are realizing that some family bonds are actually toxic attachments. It is time to loosen the knot and breathe.
family_future_en: You will establish healthy boundaries. You can love your family without being a prisoner to their expectations.
travel_past_en: You felt stuck in one place, unable to travel due to commitments or fear of the unknown.
travel_present_en: You may feel the urge to run away to escape problems, but be careful not to carry your baggage (literally and emotionally) with you.
travel_future_en: Travel will become a form of liberation. Breaking your routine environment will help break your routine mental patterns.
health_past_en: You may have been moving at a very fast pace recently. It was a period of learning how to better listen to your body’s quiet signals.
health_present_en: This is a good time to check in with your energy levels. Small, gentle adjustments to your hydration or sleep habits may help you feel more refreshed.
health_future_en: Establishing a more sustainable rhythm will likely lead to a sense of renewed vitality. You may find it easier to stay in tune with your physical needs.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are currently entwined in a situation defined by heavy attachment or a persistent habit. There is a sense of being 'stuck' in a pattern that offers immediate gratification but limits your true movement.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The friction lies in your own reluctance to let go of the 'golden chains.' You might be finding a strange comfort in your struggles or using a specific obsession to avoid facing a deeper, more uncomfortable truth.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are focused on material success, power, or satisfying a specific craving. You are looking for a way to master your surroundings through sheer force of will or external control.
celtic_cross_below_en: At the root, there is a deep-seated fear of powerlessness or lack. This hidden anxiety is driving you to overcompensate by clinging tightly to things, people, or behaviors that make you feel secure.
celtic_cross_past_en: A recent period of indulgence or intense focus on physical needs has set the stage for this. You may have traded a bit of your freedom for a promise of security or pleasure that is now starting to feel heavy.
celtic_cross_future_en: The path ahead involves a direct confrontation with your own shadow. You will soon have to decide if the temporary highs are worth the long-term cost to your spirit.
celtic_cross_self_en: You may be seeing yourself as a victim of circumstance or biology, feeling as though you have no choice but to follow your current impulses. There’s a mix of defiance and self-sabotage in your current stance.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The atmosphere around you feels restrictive or overly focused on appearances and material gain. Others may be encouraging your least healthy instincts or keeping you tied to a toxic dynamic.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You long for the intensity of your current desires but are simultaneously terrified that you've lost the key to your own handcuffs. You fear you are becoming defined by what you crave.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If this continues, the situation will lead to a realization that the chains were never locked. The ultimate destination is a choice: remain in the comfortable dark or acknowledge your power to walk away.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Stop pretending you are trapped; identify the moment you choose to stay and you regain your power.

tarot_imply_en: sudden change, crisis, revelation, destruction, awakening
standalone_past_en: You’ve just survived a crash. A sudden storm came in and wrecked your old structures, forcing you to realize that what you built was standing on shaky ground.
standalone_present_en: Lightning is striking right now! Unexpected events are shaking your world to its core. Don't try to hold up the falling walls; let them crash so you can see the sky.
standalone_future_en: Brace for impact, but know this: once the dust settles, you get a clean slate. This is your rare chance to rebuild your life from scratch, stronger than ever.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past turmoil has led to sudden present changes, sweeping away the fake to pave the way for a future where you build a new life based on reality.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, a sudden shock or collapse forced you to abandon a false sense of security, clearing the way for the truth you face now.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now unexpected events are shaking your foundations to reveal what is real; do not resist the collapse, as it is clearing space for something better.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, once the dust settles, you will have a rare opportunity to rebuild your life from scratch on a much stronger, more honest foundation.
love_past_en: A relationship ended shockingly, or a secret was revealed that broke everything.
love_present_en: Beware of intense arguments or sudden breakups. Painful truths are about to surface.
love_future_en: If the foundation is weak, it will crumble; but if you survive this, the bond will be unbreakable.
love_reading_single_en: You may experience a sudden realization that shatters your old dating patterns, or meet someone who completely upends your expectations of what love should be.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship is facing a stress test where hidden truths may surface; if your bond is genuine, honesty will help you rebuild it stronger than before.
career_past_en: Company closure, sudden layoff, or a project collapsed without warning.
career_present_en: Workplace crisis! Have a backup plan. Systems might crash or major restructuring is coming.
career_future_en: You might have to switch careers or start from scratch on a more challenging path.
finance_past_en: You faced bankruptcy or lost a large sum due to unforeseen events.
finance_present_en: Beware of emergency expenses—home repairs, car breakdowns, or sudden cash shortages.
finance_future_en: You must completely overhaul your financial system to survive; don't stick to old methods.
action_prompt_en: Don't try to prop up what's falling. Let it crash, and get your tools ready to rebuild.
reflection_question_en: What false belief needs to be destroyed from your mind once and for all?
affirmation_en: I grow and become stronger from every crisis I face.
hook_en: Sometimes lightning doesn't strike to destroy... but to wake you up!
ritual_2min_en: Build a tall tower of blocks or Lego, then knock it down (release that stress!). Then, rebuild it better to train your mind to accept new beginnings.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What event changed your life forever?
If you had to start from scratch tomorrow, what would you do differently?
What is the upside of 'destruction' from your perspective?
keywords_light: awakening, revelation, breaking free, drastic change, rebuilding
keywords_shadow: disaster, chaos, trauma, sudden loss, bankruptcy
image_alt_en: Two frightened cats flee as a tall dark tower is struck by lightning, one cat close in the foreground and a second smaller cat falling from a shattered window under a stormy sky.
illustration_prompt_en: A tall obsidian stone tower rises and dominates the scene, its top exploding where a bolt of golden lightning strikes. In the foreground near the lower right, a large startled tabby cat with puffed-up tail and wide eyes leaps away from the tower toward the viewer. Slightly behind and higher up, a second smaller cat tumbles from a shattered window of the tower. Flaming debris rains down, dark storm clouds swirl overhead, and fire glows from several tower windows. The viewpoint feels slightly low and dramatic so the tower looms huge behind the two cats. An ornate gold Art Nouveau frame with curling lightning and architectural motifs surrounds the scene, with a dense, detailed background and dynamic action in the MeowTarot cat tarot illustration style.
meta_description_en: The Tower Tarot meaning by MeowTarot: Navigate sudden change, crisis, and revelation. Find out how to rebuild stronger after the storm.
career_reading_single_en: A sudden shift at work might feel like a scratching post falling over, but it clears space for a better climb. Don't cling to the rubble; look for new opportunities.
finance_reading_single_en: An unexpected expense might pop up like a loud thunderclap. Check your safety net and avoid risky jumps or investments for now.
self_reading_single_en: Your ego might take a hit, but it's just the old fur shedding to make way for a shinier coat. Embrace the sudden clarity and let go of false pride.
family_reading_single_en: Tensions at home might boil over. It's scary like a storm, but it releases pressure that has been building up for too long. Let the air clear.
travel_reading_single_en: Plans might get cancelled or routes changed abruptly. Stay flexible as if you are someone landing on its feet, and have a backup plan ready.
health_reading_single_en: Listen to your body's sudden signals as a gentle reminder to slow down. It might be time to rest your hands and respect your energy levels.
self_past_en: A shocking event shook your confidence, stripping away illusions you used to hide behind.
self_present_en: You are in the middle of a wake-up call. The walls are shaking, but you are waking up to your true strength.
self_future_en: You will emerge from the rubble lighter and freer, with no heavy burdens holding you back anymore.
family_past_en: A sudden disruption in the family dynamic forced everyone to see the truth.
family_present_en: Arguments or sudden news are shaking the household. Keep your instincts twitching and stay safe.
family_future_en: The family structure will be rebuilt on honesty, stronger than the shaky foundation of the past.
travel_past_en: A trip went wrong or ended abruptly, teaching you to always have a backup plan.
travel_present_en: Watch out for vehicle breakdowns or sudden delays. Check your tires and tickets twice!
travel_future_en: Future travels might bring unexpected adventures that completely change your perspective on the world.
health_past_en: A period of high intensity may have left you feeling drained. You’ve learned the importance of pacing yourself and finding balance.
health_present_en: You might feel a sudden dip in energy or a need for extra quiet time. Be kind to yourself and take things one step at a time.
health_future_en: Your energy levels are likely to find a steadier rhythm. Establishing gentle daily routines can help you maintain a sense of well-being.
celtic_cross_present_en: The atmosphere is one of sudden upheaval and revelation. A structure you thought was solid is currently being tested or dismantled, forcing a radical shift in perspective.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is your resistance to the inevitable collapse. By trying to brace the walls of a falling tower, you are only prolonging the stress and risking more damage than if you simply let it fall.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are aware that a 'lightning bolt' moment has occurred. You are trying to process the shock and figure out how to navigate the immediate chaos of a broken plan or ego.
celtic_cross_below_en: Underneath the surface, a long-building pressure was seeking release. This isn't an accident; your subconscious has been aware of the instability in your life for a long time and is finally forcing a reset.
celtic_cross_past_en: You are emerging from a period built on a false foundation or an outdated belief. Recent events have shaken the loose stones, leading directly to this current state of disruption.
celtic_cross_future_en: Next comes the clearing of the debris. The immediate shock will fade, leaving you with a blank slate and the truth of what remains when all the artificial layers are gone.
celtic_cross_self_en: You feel exposed and perhaps defenseless, as if you are someone whose hiding spot has been suddenly moved. There is a raw honesty in your position right now, even if it feels terrifying.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The external world is offering zero stability right now. Disruptions in your career, home, or social circle are creating a volatile environment where the old rules no longer apply.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for the breakthrough and the liberation that comes with the truth, but you are paralyzed by the fear of the actual destruction required to get there.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: The situation is leading toward a radical awakening. While the path is messy, the outcome is a much stronger, more honest foundation that can no longer be shaken by illusions.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Don't try to save the burning building; just focus on getting yourself to safe, open ground.

tarot_imply_en: hope, healing, inspiration, serenity, renewed faith
standalone_past_en: The storm has passed, leaving a quiet, washed-clean feeling in your soul. You survived the darkness, and now you are finally beginning to heal.
standalone_present_en: This is your moment to breathe. The universe is signaling that you are safe and on the right path. Open your heart—hope and inspiration are flowing back in.
standalone_future_en: Your wish is not far off. The star of success is shining specifically for you. Keep looking up, because a future of deep fulfillment and peace is guaranteed.
reading_summary_preview_en: Overcoming past hardships brings present peace. The light of hope guides you toward a future where healing and dreams become reality.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you weathered a difficult spiritual storm, but you emerged from that darkness with a cleansed spirit and a newfound appreciation for peace.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, you are in a gentle phase of healing and renewal; trust that you are on the right path and let inspiration flow freely into your life.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, the hopes you have nurtured will begin to manifest; keep your faith strong, as a future of genuine fulfillment and lasting happiness awaits you.
love_past_en: Old wounds from past love have healed, or you learned to love yourself first.
love_present_en: A bright and hopeful relationship. If single, you naturally attract the right person.
love_future_en: A fulfilling love that supports you spiritually; the relationship will evolve beautifully.
love_reading_single_en: You are radiating a natural, healing energy that draws others in effortlessly; focus on your own shine and you will attract a connection that truly aligns with your spirit.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship is entering a harmonious phase where spiritual connection deepens; share your dreams openly with your partner to build a future full of mutual support.
career_past_en: You discovered new inspiration or work that felt spiritually fulfilling.
career_present_en: Creativity is flowing; it's a great time to start a dream project or artistic work.
career_future_en: You will gain fame and recognition for your work; success will come with joy.
finance_past_en: You recovered financially or received help during tough times.
finance_present_en: Financial situations are clearing up; there is hope and new channels for income.
finance_future_en: Luck and wealth will flow abundantly, like water pouring endlessly from a pitcher.
action_prompt_en: Look up at the sky and make a wish! Believe in your dreams and act with a joyful heart.
reflection_question_en: If miracles were real, what is the one thing you would ask for in your life?
affirmation_en: I always have hope and faith in a bright future.
hook_en: Even in the darkest night, there is always a star shining just for you.
ritual_2min_en: Before bed, stand at a window, find a star (or imagine one). Breathe deeply, release all worries to the wind, leaving only hope.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What is your biggest dream that you dare not tell anyone?
What are some good things happening in your life lately?
How can you heal yourself from fatigue today?
keywords_light: hope, inspiration, creativity, calm, renewal
keywords_shadow: despair, lack of faith, discouragement, feeling lost, negativity

career_reading_single_en: Your creative spark is lighting up the room. Trust your unique vision and don't be afraid to show your true colors at work.
finance_reading_single_en: A flow of generosity and abundance is coming. If you've been worried about money, relax—the universe is balancing your books.
self_reading_single_en: You are glowing with renewed hope. Take time to pamper your spirit and body; you deserve to feel beautiful inside and out.
family_reading_single_en: Peace is returning to your home. It's a good time to forgive past grievances and enjoy gentle, harmonious moments with loved ones.
travel_reading_single_en: A trip near water or to a place where you can see the stars clearly would be perfect for your soul right now.
health_reading_single_en: A gentle energy of renewal is surrounding you. Taking small moments to rest and breathe deeply can help you feel more refreshed.
self_past_en: You felt lost in the dark, perhaps disconnected from your own sparkle or purpose.
self_present_en: You are actively rediscovering your inner light and learning to practice true self-love.
self_future_en: You will radiate confidence and natural beauty, becoming a beacon of hope for others.
family_past_en: There was distance or a lack of emotional support in the household that made you feel lonely.
family_present_en: Healing conversations are bridging the gaps; peace and understanding are being restored.
family_future_en: A harmonious home life awaits, where everyone supports each other's dreams and well-being.
travel_past_en: Travel plans were cancelled, or you felt trapped in one place without inspiration.
travel_present_en: You are dreaming of a getaway that refreshes your spirit, likely somewhere quiet and scenic.
travel_future_en: A magical journey to a serene destination will fulfill your wanderlust and clear your mind.
health_past_en: You may have felt a bit depleted or out of sync lately, as if your energy was being spread a little too thin.
health_present_en: This is a lovely time to prioritize gentle self-care. Focus on simple things like staying hydrated and finding a steady, comfortable pace for your day.
health_future_en: A sense of balance and lightness is on the horizon. You may find it easier to listen to your body’s needs and maintain a peaceful inner rhythm.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are currently entering a phase of profound calm and inspiration. After a period of chaos, the dust is settling, and you are beginning to feel a renewed sense of hope and spiritual alignment.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge here is 'passive optimism.' You may be so comforted by the glimmer of hope that you forget to take the practical steps needed to ground that vision into reality. Inspiration without action can become a beautiful distraction.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are looking at the 'big picture' and focusing on healing. You are dreaming big and allowing yourself to believe that things will finally work out for the best.
celtic_cross_below_en: At your core, there is an unshakeable faith that the universe is supporting you. This deep-seated serenity is acting as a natural reservoir of strength, helping you stay soft even when things are hard.
celtic_cross_past_en: You have recently navigated a significant crisis or upheaval. The Star appears now because you have successfully shed the old skin and are ready to be replenished.
celtic_cross_future_en: Expect a gentle flow of inspiration and unexpected synchronicities. The path ahead is clear and guided, leading you toward a period of creative and emotional restoration.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are showing up with vulnerability and grace. You are being asked to be your most authentic self, pouring your energy out freely without fear of running dry.
celtic_cross_environment_en: Your surroundings are becoming more peaceful and supportive. You may find yourself in spaces (or with people) that encourage your healing and mirror your internal sense of serenity.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You desperately want to believe in this bright future, but there is a lingering fear that it’s just an illusion—that the star will fade and leave you in the dark again.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you maintain this openness, the situation will settle into a long-term state of balance and fulfillment. You are moving toward a version of your life that feels both inspired and deeply authentic.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Keep your eyes on the star, but remember to keep your hands on the ground; dreams need a foundation to grow.

tarot_imply_en: fear, subconscious, illusion, intuition, uncertainty
standalone_past_en: You’ve been wandering through a mental fog, dealing with confusion or anxiety that kept you up at night. It was unsettling, but it woke up your intuition.
standalone_present_en: Trust your gut, not your eyes. Things are hazy and illusions are everywhere right now. If something feels off, it probably is—use your instinct to navigate the dark.
standalone_future_en: The lights are about to turn on. Secrets that were swept under the rug will be revealed. You’ll have to face your deep fears, but doing so will finally set you free.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past confusion leaves the present situation unclear. However, if you trust your intuition and face your inner shadows, the future will bring clarity.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you navigated a fog of confusion and hidden fears, which, while unsettling, forced you to finally wake up your dormant intuition.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, everything feels hazy and things are not what they seem; do not rely on your eyes, but trust your gut instincts to navigate this uncertainty.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, hidden truths will surface from the shadows; facing these fears now is the only way to dispel the illusions and find true emotional clarity.
love_reading_single_en: You might feel confused by mixed signals or attract a mysterious stranger; trust your intuition to tell the difference between a soulful connection and a deceiving illusion.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship may feel emotionally heavy or unclear right now; avoid letting fears create false narratives, and instead use your intuition to understand what remains unsaid.
love_past_en: You experienced a relationship filled with secrets, hidden agendas, or deep suspicion.
love_present_en: The relationship feels murky and undefined. Beware of deception or creating fantasies in your head.
love_future_en: Secrets will be revealed, or you will finally see the truth in love after being lost in a dream.
career_past_en: You worked amidst rumors or were unsure about the company's direction.
career_present_en: The workplace vibe is untrustworthy, possibly involving under-the-table deals, or anxiety is paralyzing your decisions.
career_future_en: Beware of being framed or misunderstood, but in this crisis, you will discover who your true enemies are.
finance_past_en: You lost money on worthless things due to misunderstanding or being scammed.
finance_present_en: Do not invest in anything unclear yet. Watch out for invisible hidden clauses.
finance_future_en: High risk of financial error; delay major financial decisions for now.
action_prompt_en: Stop chasing shadows. Sit still and listen to the whisper within. Your intuition knows the answer best.
reflection_question_en: What is the fear you dare not admit to yourself?
affirmation_en: I dare to face the darkness to find the light.
hook_en: In the dark, something is hidden... and cats like us see it clearly.
ritual_2min_en: On a full moon night (or imagine one), place a glass of water by the window to catch the moonlight. Drink it to wash away fear and boost intuition.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:

What do you feel insecure about right now?
keywords_light: intuition, dreams, unconscious, imagination, instinct

health_future_en: You may soon find a more peaceful pace, allowing your natural vitality to return gently.
