tarot_imply_en: happiness, success, vitality, revelation, clarity
standalone_past_en: You recently hit a high note—a moment of clarity, success, or pure joy that chased the clouds away. That warmth is still fueling you.
standalone_present_en: It's your time to shine! No need to worry about hidden traps; everything is bright and clear. Step out into the sunlight and enjoy this wave of happiness.
standalone_future_en: The forecast is 100% sunny. Great success and abundance are heading your way. Get ready for a period of life where things just go right.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you emerged from confusion into clarity, experiencing a moment of pure joy or success that swept away previous shadows.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, everything is illuminated and clear; step into the spotlight with confidence because the universe is fully supporting your joy today.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, you are heading toward a season of sustained brilliance and abundance, where your efforts will bloom into lasting success.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past brightness leads to present clarity and vitality, confirming that the future will definitely be filled with success and happiness.
love_past_en: Past love was warm and open, possibly involving marriage or children.
love_present_en: Love is bright with no secrets. If single, you are radiating irresistible charm.
love_future_en: Good news regarding weddings, children, or a perfect love is on the horizon.
love_reading_single_en: You are radiating an irresistible magnetic energy right now; simply being your authentic, joyful self will attract a partner who matches your warmth.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship is entering a phase of total transparency and joy; focus on celebrating each other and enjoying this sunny period without worry.
career_past_en: You achieved high success in a project or received widespread recognition.
career_present_en: Your work catches the boss's eye; the spotlight is on you. It's showtime!
career_future_en: A stable position, high-level success, and fame await you.
finance_past_en: Investments flourished, or you received very satisfying profits.
finance_present_en: Finances are very liquid; money-making opportunities are clear. Nothing to worry about.
finance_future_en: Wealth and abundance will pour in; you will be comfortable for a long time.
action_prompt_en: Smile as wide as you can! Share your joy with others, and the world will smile back.
reflection_question_en: What makes you feel that being alive is truly worth it?
affirmation_en: I am a shining light that attracts all things good.
hook_en: Step into the sunshine! Today is your day.
ritual_2min_en: Go outside, face the sun (close eyes if bright). Spread your arms and imagine absorbing golden energy into every cell of your body.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What are the 3 things you are most grateful for today?
What activity makes you lose track of time and happy like a child?
How can you pass on positive energy to others?
keywords_light: joy, success, celebration, positivity, vitality
keywords_shadow: temporary depression, delayed success, false optimism, sunburn (too much ego)
image_alt_en: A joyous ginger cat riding a white horse in a field of sunflowers under a massive, smiling sun, with a red banner flowing behind.
illustration_prompt_en: A joyful ginger kitten riding a white pony through a vibrant field of sunflowers, a massive benevolent smiling sun in the blue sky, holding a red banner, bright warm colors, happiness, art nouveau style.
meta_description_en: The Sun Tarot meaning by MeowTarot: The best card in the deck! Discover happiness, success, and vitality awaiting you.
career_reading_single_en: You are in the spotlight! Recognition, success, and clear achievements are shining upon your work life.
finance_reading_single_en: Abundance is flowing freely; investments are growing and financial clarity makes this a lucky time for money.
self_reading_single_en: You are glowing with confidence and vitality; trust in your inner light, for you are exactly where you need to be.
family_reading_single_en: Warmth fills your home; it is a wonderful time for family reunions, celebrations, or simply basking in shared joy.
travel_reading_single_en: A trip to a sunny destination will bring immense joy; expect smooth journeys and unforgettable fun.
health_reading_single_en: You may feel a warm boost in vitality lately. It’s a lovely time to enjoy some light movement and soak up some gentle energy.
self_past_en: You stepped out of the shadows and found a new sense of self-worth that banished old doubts.
self_present_en: You are the main character right now, shining bright with unshakeable confidence.
self_future_en: You will maintain this inner glow, becoming a beacon of positivity for everyone around you.
family_past_en: A happy childhood memory or a recent joyful event brought your family closer together.
family_present_en: Laughter and good news surround your kin; enjoy this moment of perfect domestic harmony.
family_future_en: The family bond will grow even stronger, possibly expanding with new members or celebrations.
travel_past_en: A memorable trip in the past recharged your batteries and left you with warm memories.
travel_present_en: Conditions are perfect for travel; go somewhere warm and bright to match your mood.
travel_future_en: You will discover a destination that feels like paradise, bringing you lasting happiness.
health_past_en: You’ve recently focused on restoring your energy and finding a better balance for your well-being.
health_present_en: Your energy feels bright and steady right now. Consider maintaining this glow with mindful pacing and staying well-hydrated.
health_future_en: A sense of vitality continues to shine ahead. Keeping a gentle routine and a positive outlook will help you stay grounded.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are standing in the ultimate sunny spot. Everything is visible, radiant, and filled with a sense of uncomplicated joy and vital energy.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The glare might be so bright that it’s blinding you to the nuances or making you feel exposed. Success here brings the pressure to stay 'on' and keep performing at your peak.
celtic_cross_above_en: Your focus is entirely on success, expansion, and celebrating your achievements. You are consciously leaning into optimism and looking for the win.
celtic_cross_below_en: A core sense of inner worth and childlike wonder is fueling your drive. Deep down, you are healing old wounds by finally allowing yourself to be seen and celebrated.
celtic_cross_past_en: A breakthrough or a moment of total clarity recently paved the way for the abundance you are experiencing now.
celtic_cross_future_en: The path ahead is clear and inviting. Expect a period of high visibility where your efforts are recognized and rewarded with warmth.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are radiating confidence and authenticity. You’re showing up as your most vibrant self, ready to play and lead with an open heart.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The atmosphere around you is supportive and celebratory. You are surrounded by people who reflect your light and encourage your growth.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for this state of bliss to be permanent, yet you fear the inevitable setting of the sun or that this joy is 'too good to be true.'
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you keep basking in this truth, you will reach a state of absolute fulfillment where your external success perfectly matches your internal happiness.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Don't let the heat burn you out; remember that even the brightest sun needs to set so we can rest.

tarot_imply_en: Release, Breaking free, Detachment, Awakening, Recovery
standalone_past_en: You finally hit your limit and snapped the chains. You made the brave, terrifying choice to walk away from something that was slowly poisoning you.
standalone_present_en: The cage is open, but your legs are still shaky. This is the detox phase—it feels raw and uncomfortable to be free, but don't you dare go back to that toxicity.
standalone_future_en: Stay the course. The shadow is fading, and you are reclaiming your power. Soon, you will stand tall, completely unburdened by the demons that once owned you.
reading_summary_preview_en: Your courage to break bad cycles in the past is allowing you to glimpse freedom now. Though difficult at first, the future result is a cleansed and stronger life.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you hit a breaking point and made the brave decision to sever the chains of dependency or negativity that were holding you back.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are in a detox phase, feeling the raw vulnerability of freedom; stay strong, as you are reclaiming your power and shedding old skins.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, true independence awaits as you step fully into the light, leaving the shadows of addiction or toxic patterns far behind you.
love_reading_single_en: You are waking up to your own worth and learning to spot red flags early; take this time to heal fully before rushing into anything new.
love_reading_couple_en: You are breaking free from unhealthy dynamic loops; honesty and setting boundaries right now will help clear the air and restore respect.
love_past_en: You successfully walked away from a toxic relationship or left someone who made you feel worthless.
love_present_en: The blindfold is off! You see who truly loves you and who is using you. It's time to reclaim your dignity and happiness.
love_future_en: You will be free from old karmic love loops and ready to open your heart to a truly healthy relationship.
career_past_en: You quit an oppressive job or decided to refuse unethical work for your peace of mind.
career_present_en: Planning a prison break (from work)! You are actively looking for new paths that offer more freedom and authenticity.
career_future_en: You will find work that offers freedom, or liberate yourself from being an employee to become your own boss.
finance_past_en: You started clearing a large debt or quit the spendthrift habits that ruined your finances.
finance_present_en: Belt-tightening mode to restore liquidity. It feels tight, but for a better future, you must endure.
finance_future_en: Financial independence will happen. You will break free from debt cycles and regain spending freedom.
action_prompt_en: Don't hesitate! The door is open. Run towards freedom and don't turn back to pick up the trash.
reflection_question_en: Are you ready to take 100% responsibility for your life now that no one is dictating it?
affirmation_en: I am strong enough to break every chain.
hook_en: The cage is open... will you fly out or wait for them to lock it again?
ritual_2min_en: Take a salt bath or scrub your skin to slough off dead cells and negative energy. Imagine attachments washing down the drain with the soap suds.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What is the first thing you will do to celebrate this freedom?
What did you learn from your darkest moments?
What promise will you make to yourself to never go back?
keywords_light: Freedom, Release, Sobriety, Empowerment, Breaking habits
keywords_shadow: Relapse, Fear of freedom, Denial, Hidden chains, Weakness
image_alt_en: A black cat shaking off a loose collar, the chain broken on the floor, walking away from a dark cave towards a bright green meadow.
illustration_prompt_en: A sleek black cat shaking off a jeweled collar, a broken golden chain lying on the stone floor, walking away from a dark shadowy throne room towards a bright sunlit meadow full of flowers, sense of relief and liberation, art nouveau style --ar 2:3
meta_description_en: The Devil Reversed tarot meaning: Breaking free from addiction, release from toxic bonds, and finding freedom. Learn how to reclaim your power.
career_reading_single_en: You are breaking free from a restrictive work environment or a soul-crushing routine. Now is the time to pursue projects that truly align with your inner values and creative freedom.
finance_reading_single_en: The cycle of impulsive spending or financial dependency is coming to an end. You are regaining control over your resources and moving toward a much lighter, debt-free state of mind.
self_reading_single_en: You are reclaiming your power from old habits and shadow versions of yourself. This is a beautiful moment of self-discovery where you realize that the cage was never locked.
family_reading_single_en: Old family patterns or toxic dynamics are losing their grip on you. You are choosing to set healthy boundaries, which will eventually lead to a more peaceful and authentic home life.
travel_reading_single_en: A trip right now could serve as a symbolic 'victory lap' for your new independence. Traveling to wide-open spaces may help reinforce your sense of freedom and clarity.
health_reading_single_en: You might feel a sense of relief as you let go of taxing habits. Consider focusing on gentle movement and staying hydrated to help your body process this refreshing energy shift.
self_past_en: In the past, you may have felt defined by your limitations or stuck in a cycle of self-doubt that kept you from seeing your true potential.
self_present_en: Currently, you are in the process of unlearning old behaviors and shedding the 'shadow' parts of your identity that no longer serve you.
self_future_en: The future holds a version of you that is fully sovereign and self-aware, acting out of love and choice rather than fear or compulsion.
family_past_en: There may have been heavy emotional baggage or codependent ties within your family circle that felt difficult to navigate or escape.
family_present_en: You are likely finding the courage to speak your truth and distance yourself from family drama, prioritizing your own peace of mind.
family_future_en: A healthier family dynamic is possible as you continue to stand in your power, leading to relationships built on mutual respect rather than obligation.
travel_past_en: Past travels might have felt like a way to run away from problems or were perhaps restricted by factors outside of your control.
travel_present_en: You might now be considering a journey that focuses on spiritual cleansing or simply enjoying the world without any heavy burdens attached.
travel_future_en: Future adventures will likely feel spontaneous and liberating, allowing you to explore new horizons with a light heart and a clear spirit.
health_past_en: You may have experienced periods of low energy or felt 'chained' to routines that didn't support your physical or emotional well-being.
health_present_en: This is a good time to listen to your body's needs. If you feel tired, prioritizing extra sleep and a gentle routine could help restore your natural vitality.
health_future_en: By continuing to release what no longer serves you, you may find a sustainable balance that leaves you feeling more vibrant and grounded.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are at a pivotal turning point where the chains are loosening, and you're finally recognizing the toxic patterns or habits that have kept you small.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The friction lies in the 'comfort' of the cage; you might find yourself gravitating back toward familiar drama or old dependencies simply because freedom feels intimidating.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are focused on detoxing your life, setting boundaries, and reclaiming the personal power you feel you've signed away.
celtic_cross_below_en: Deep down, there is a lingering fear that you aren't strong enough to stay free, or an old belief that you don't deserve a life without struggle.
celtic_cross_past_en: You’ve recently survived a period of intense restriction or obsession that forced you to look at your darkest reflections in the mirror.
celtic_cross_future_en: The next step involves a significant 'break'—an event or realization that confirms you can no longer be controlled by what used to haunt you.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are presenting as the survivor who is still a bit shaky but determined to walk toward the light, refusing to be a victim of your own impulses anymore.
celtic_cross_environment_en: You are surrounded by reminders of your past self or people who may still benefit from you staying trapped, making your resolve even more crucial.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You long for total liberation and a fresh start, yet you fear the void that remains once the familiar noise of your 'demons' goes quiet.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you continue this release, you will move into a phase of true self-governance, where your choices are driven by clarity rather than compulsion.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Acknowledge that freedom feels lonely at first; don't mistake peace for boredom and run back to the chaos.

tarot_imply_en: Averting disaster, Fear of change, Internal collapse, Prolonged crisis, Denial
standalone_past_en: You saw the cracks appearing but chose to cover them with wallpaper. You might have dodged a bullet recently, but the underlying structure is still compromised.
standalone_present_en: You are frantically holding onto a crumbling situation, refusing to let it fall. The stress of maintaining this illusion is eating you alive. Just let it collapse.
standalone_future_en: Avoiding the crash today just means a bigger disaster tomorrow. If you don't dismantle this ruin yourself, it will fall on you when you least expect it.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you barely avoided a major crisis or chose to ignore deep cracks in your foundation, leaving fear to linger beneath the surface.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are resisting necessary change, trying to hold together a situation that is already crumbling instead of letting it fall.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, delaying the inevitable will only transform a quick shock into prolonged suffering; it is better to dismantle the ruin yourself than wait for the crash.
reading_summary_preview_en: Trying to avoid past pain is creating immense pressure now. Accepting reality and daring to change is the only way to stop the brewing crisis.
love_reading_single_en: You may be avoiding new connections out of fear, or holding onto a toxic past dynamic that prevents you from healing and moving forward.
love_reading_couple_en: Ignoring the structural issues in your relationship won't save it; suppression only turns a sudden break into a slow, painful erosion of trust.
love_past_en: You almost broke up but got back together without solving the issues, or stayed in a ticking time-bomb relationship.
love_present_en: The relationship is fragile, yet you pretend everything is fine. Beware of an explosion of long-suppressed emotions.
love_future_en: You might not break up immediately, but the love will slowly die, causing even more pain.
career_past_en: You survived a layoff or company collapse but have been working in paranoia ever since.
career_present_en: Serious structural issues at work are being covered up by management. You feel insecure and want to flee but can't yet.
career_future_en: Accumulated problems will eventually explode, or you may have to work amidst the ruins of your team.
finance_past_en: You narrowly avoided bankruptcy or loss, recovering but barely escaping with your skin.
finance_present_en: Hidden debts are surfacing, or you are borrowing to pay off old debts—a band-aid solution.
finance_future_en: A 'boiling frog' financial crisis (worsening slowly until it's too late) awaits if you don't tighten your belt seriously.
action_prompt_en: Don't wait for the building to collapse! Walk away from the danger zone now, even if you have to leave things behind.
reflection_question_en: What are you stalling for, when you already know the ending?
affirmation_en: I dare to face the truth to release myself from fear.
hook_en: Out of the frying pan into the fire... or should you just put out the fire?
ritual_2min_en: Check for cracks or broken items in your home and fix them immediately, or throw them away to counteract the energy of destruction and rebuild stability.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What bad situation are you pretending not to see?
If your life crashed down, what real things would remain?
What are you holding onto tightest right now (and is it truly stable)?
keywords_light: Survival, Second chance, Resilience, Warning signs, Preparation
keywords_shadow: Denial, Prolonged suffering, Fear of change, Internal turmoil, Collapse
image_alt_en: A tower shaking violently with cracks appearing but not yet falling, a cat clinging fearfully to the roof, dark storm clouds swirling ominously.
illustration_prompt_en: A dark stone tower shaking violently with glowing cracks spreading across the walls, a terrified cat clinging to the weathervane on the roof, ominous swirling storm clouds in deep grey and purple, tension before the collapse, tarot style --ar 2:3
meta_description_en: The Tower Reversed tarot meaning: Averting disaster, fear of change, and internal collapse. Learn why delaying the inevitable only prolongs the pain.
career_reading_single_en: You might be sensing instability at work but are trying to ignore it; acknowledging these small cracks now could prevent a bigger collapse later.
finance_reading_single_en: Your finances may be under pressure from hidden debts or poor foundations. It might be a good time to quietly reorganize before things become urgent.
self_reading_single_en: You may be resisting a necessary inner change. Letting go of an old version of yourself might feel scary, but it could lead to much-needed peace.
family_reading_single_en: Tension in the household might be lingering beneath the surface. A gentle approach to addressing home issues could prevent a future emotional outburst.
travel_reading_single_en: Travel plans might feel a bit shaky or stressful right now. Consider a quiet staycation or a very low-pressure trip to help ground your energy.
health_reading_single_en: You might feel a bit drained from holding everything together. Gentle rest and extra hydration could help your body process the accumulated stress.
self_past_en: You previously managed to avoid a major personal shift, but the pressure from that choice may still be weighing on your mind.
self_present_en: Currently, you might be feeling stuck in a shell that's too small for you, fearing the mess that comes with breaking free.
self_future_en: The internal pressure may continue to build until you choose to walk away from old habits. A slow, conscious dismantling is easier than a sudden crash.
family_past_en: A potential family conflict was narrowly avoided or suppressed, leaving some unresolved feelings in the air.
family_present_en: Home life might feel like walking on eggshells. You could be trying to keep the peace at the expense of your own comfort.
family_future_en: Ignoring domestic issues might lead to a prolonged period of unease. Small, honest conversations might help clear the heavy energy over time.
travel_past_en: A past journey might have been canceled or delayed, or perhaps you narrowly escaped a travel-related mishap.
travel_present_en: You may feel hesitant to move or travel, sensing that things aren't quite stable enough for a big trip right now.
travel_future_en: Future travel might be marked by minor disruptions. Keeping your plans flexible and double-checking details could help ease any anxiety.
health_past_en: In the past, you might have experienced a period of high tension that you barely managed to navigate without a total burnout.
health_present_en: You might notice signs of stress, like shallow breathing or tight muscles. Consider if a little more sleep or gentle stretching could be beneficial.
health_future_en: Your energy levels may remain unpredictable if stress isn't managed. Listening to your body's early cues for rest could be a helpful habit to build.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are currently in the midst of a slow-motion internal shift, where the structure of your life is changing without the dramatic external collapse.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is your own resistance to the necessary breakdown; you are trying to hold up a ceiling that has already cracked, delaying the inevitable and exhausting yourself.
celtic_cross_above_en: Mentally, you are focused on damage control and trying to find a way to navigate this transition without losing everything you've built.
celtic_cross_below_en: Underneath, you know that the foundation was flawed from the start, and there's a subconscious desire to just let it fall so you can finally breathe.
celtic_cross_past_en: A recent shock or a 'near-miss' crisis has left you feeling unstable, forcing you to reconsider what is actually worth saving.
celtic_cross_future_en: Expect a period of quiet dismantling; you will be slowly taking apart the pieces of your life that no longer fit the person you are becoming.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are acting with extreme caution, perhaps even a bit of denial, as you try to navigate the rubble of an old belief system.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The world around you feels unstable or tense, as if everyone is waiting for a storm that has been forecasted but hasn't arrived yet.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope you can avert the total disaster and fix things privately, but you fear that the internal upheaval is too big to contain for much longer.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: The path leads to a gradual but necessary transformation; the tower won't fall on your head, but it will eventually be replaced by a more honest structure.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Don't waste energy trying to 'fix' what needs to be reinvented; let the old versions of yourself go.

tarot_imply_en: Despair, Lack of faith, Broken dreams, Uninspired, Discouragement
standalone_past_en: A dream shattered or a wish went unanswered, leaving you in the dark. That disappointment made you close your heart to protect it from hoping again.
standalone_present_en: You are staring at the mud and forgetting the sky exists. You feel disconnected, uninspired, and maybe a bit cynical. The universe hasn't left you; you just stopped looking up.
standalone_future_en: Staying in this darkness is a choice. You won't find a way out by looking down. You need to force yourself to find one tiny spark of gratitude to light the way.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past disappointments are clouding your present vision, leaving you discouraged and directionless. Without reclaiming your faith, the future risks being gloomy and stagnant.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, a significant disappointment or shattered dream extinguished your inner light, causing you to close yourself off to protect against further pain.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, you feel disconnected and uninspired, as if the universe has turned its back on you; today is a call to stop staring at the ground and seek even the faintest glimmer of hope.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, dwelling on pessimism will only prolong the darkness; you must actively choose to nurture a small seed of faith to prevent your spirit from stagnating.
love_past_en: You were so disappointed in love that you became cynical, or lost belief that true love exists.
love_present_en: Feeling deeply lonely even when talking to someone, or cynicism is blocking your chances. The relationship lacks romance and hope.
love_future_en: It might take a long time for heart wounds to fully heal, or beware of being so negative that you scare everyone away.
love_reading_single_en: If you are single, past wounds may be making you cynical or closed off to new connections. You are encouraged to heal your trust issues before expecting a new romance to fix everything.
love_reading_couple_en: If you are in a relationship, a sense of distance or hopelessness may be clouding your connection. It is vital to share your vulnerabilities honestly rather than withdrawing into silence.
career_past_en: You worked a soul-crushing job or a dream project failed miserably.
career_present_en: Burnout! Extremely bored with work, lacking creativity, feeling like you're just going through the motions aimlessly.
career_future_en: Without new inspiration, your career will hit a dead end, or work quality will suffer because your heart isn't in it.
finance_past_en: You lost money to the point of discouragement, or a well-laid financial plan collapsed.
finance_present_en: Stressed about money, can't see a way out of debt, or income isn't enough to fund your dreams.
finance_future_en: Beware of pessimism stopping you from investing, or missing money-making chances due to fear.
action_prompt_en: Stop digging your own grave! Look up, find one small good thing about today, and be grateful for it.
reflection_question_en: What stole the hope from your eyes?
affirmation_en: I give myself permission to hope again.
hook_en: The sky isn't dark forever... it's just a bit cloudy right now.
ritual_2min_en: Wash your face with ice-cold water to wake up from the gloom. Stare in the mirror and smile at yourself (even if forced) for 10 seconds to trick your brain into releasing happiness hormones.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What is the worst thing you survived?
List 3 things you can still have hope for right now.
If you weren't afraid of disappointment, what would you do?
keywords_light: Regaining faith, Self-care, Reality check, Gentle healing, Patience
keywords_shadow: Hopelessness, Depression, Disconnection, Negativity, Unfulfilled dreams
image_alt_en: A sad cat sitting by a muddy, dried-up pool, with cloudy skies blocking the stars, pouring water from a cracked jug that leaks.
illustration_prompt_en: A melancholy white cat sitting beside a dried-up muddy pool, cloudy dark night sky with no stars visible, pouring water from a cracked golden jug that leaks onto dry earth, atmosphere of sadness and loss, tarot card style, art nouveau, muted grey and brown tones --ar 2:3
meta_description_en: The Star Reversed tarot meaning: Losing hope, feeling uninspired, and despair. Learn how to reignite your spark and find your way back to the light.
career_reading_single_en: You might feel like you've lost your professional North Star; it's okay to pause and wait for your creative spark to return naturally.
finance_reading_single_en: Financial anxiety might be clouding your judgment; focusing on small, manageable budget steps rather than the 'big picture' could help.
self_reading_single_en: You may feel disconnected from your inner magic right now; give yourself permission to rest until you feel bright again.
family_reading_single_en: The home atmosphere might feel a bit heavy or uninspired; a little extra personal space for everyone could help clear the air.
travel_reading_single_en: Travel plans might feel more like a chore than a joy; consider a very low-effort 'staycation' to recharge your batteries instead.
health_reading_single_en: Your energy levels might feel a bit 'cloudy' or low; prioritizing consistent sleep and gentle movement may help you feel more grounded.
self_past_en: In the past, you may have experienced a loss of direction that made you doubt your own inner light and capabilities.
self_present_en: Currently, you might be struggling to find meaning; remember that even in the dark, the stars are still there, just hidden for a moment.
self_future_en: Your inner glow will eventually return; focus on small acts of self-kindness to help your spirit brighten up gradually.
family_past_en: There might have been a sense of collective disappointment or a lack of shared hope within your domestic circle recently.
family_present_en: Communication may feel stagnant or pessimistic; it might help to avoid forced optimism and just be present with each other's feelings.
family_future_en: The emotional fog will lift; as you find your own peace, it will naturally help the family environment become more harmonious again.
travel_past_en: A previous journey might have felt underwhelming or lacked the spiritual refreshment you were seeking.
travel_present_en: Right now, you might not feel like going anywhere. Staying close to your safe space is the best way to heal your heart.
travel_future_en: Future travel will feel more inspiring once your energy settles; wait for the timing that feels like an invitation, not an effort.
health_past_en: You may have pushed through a period of mental fatigue or low motivation without giving yourself enough time to fully recover.
health_present_en: Your spirit might feel like it needs a 'Do Not Disturb' sign; focusing on deep breaths and hydration could be very beneficial today.
health_future_en: Vitality may return in gentle waves; as long as you listen to your body’s signals and avoid overexertion, you'll find balance again.
celtic_cross_present_en: The current atmosphere is one of dimmed inspiration; you are in a phase where hope feels distant or your sense of purpose is temporarily clouded.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is a creeping cynicism or 'spiritual burnout'; it's hard to stay open to healing when you feel like the universe has stopped listening.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are trying to find logical reasons for your lack of progress, focusing on practical flaws rather than emotional replenishment.
celtic_cross_below_en: At your root, there is a deep reservoir of unaddressed disappointment or a feeling of being 'lost in the dark' that you haven't dared to name.
celtic_cross_past_en: A period of high idealism or a dream that didn't manifest as expected has recently left you feeling deflated and skeptical.
celtic_cross_future_en: The near future requires you to ground your dreams in reality; you'll need to focus on small, tangible steps rather than waiting for a grand sign.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are appearing as someone who has lost their 'spark,' perhaps feeling uncreative or disconnected from the intuitive flow that usually guides you.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The external setting is uninspiring or overly critical, offering very little emotional nourishment or space for your vulnerability.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope to find your way back to a place of faith and peace, but you fear that you’ve permanently lost your connection to your higher path.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: This pattern leads toward a necessary period of 'internal watering'; you will eventually realize that hope is a discipline, not just a feeling you wait for.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Stop looking for the North Star and start by lighting a single candle in your own room.

tarot_imply_en: Denial, Self-criticism, Ignoring the call, Stagnation, Fear of judgment
standalone_past_en: You have been replaying old mistakes in your head, refusing to let yourself off the hook. This quiet guilt has been holding you back from moving forward.
standalone_present_en: The alarm is ringing loud and clear, but you are hitting the snooze button. You know there is a truth you need to face, yet you are choosing to look away right now.
standalone_future_en: Staying in this denial will only keep you trapped in a loop. If you don't answer the call now, you risk looking back with 'what if' regrets later.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you allowed deep-seated guilt or fear of judgment to hold you back, causing you to refuse forgiveness and miss out on valuable opportunities for growth.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are ignoring a loud wake-up call or refusing to face a necessary truth; staying in this state of denial will only lead to further stagnation today.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, if you continue to close your eyes to reality, you risk getting stuck in a repetitive cycle of regret and missing your chance for genuine renewal.
reading_summary_preview_en: Clinging to past guilt makes you deaf and blind to present opportunities. Without opening up to the truth, the future risks being filled with regret and stagnation.
love_reading_single_en: You may be blocking new connections by clinging to past hurts or judging yourself too harshly; it is time to forgive yourself so love can actually enter.
love_reading_couple_en: The relationship feels stalled by old resentments or a refusal to communicate openly; ignoring these underlying issues now could lead to unnecessary drifting apart.
love_past_en: You kept digging up old issues to argue about, or refused to move on from a relationship that was already over.
love_present_en: Obsessing over faults or blaming yourself for the past. The relationship is stalled by bitterness.
love_future_en: Beware of losing a good person due to hesitation, or suffering because you dare not make a choice.
career_past_en: You ignored warnings or turned down a promotion due to lack of self-confidence.
career_present_en: Feeling stuck, unfairly evaluated, or perhaps it is you who refuses to upskill with the changing world.
career_future_en: Without adaptation, you will become obsolete or be forced to stay in the same unhappy job.
finance_past_en: You made a financial mistake and kept blaming yourself instead of starting over.
finance_present_en: Old debts are haunting you, or you are procrastinating on sorting out financial messes.
finance_future_en: Financial issues will drag on if not dealt with decisively. Beware of lawsuits or fines.
action_prompt_en: Unplug your ears! Listen to the warnings from others and your heart. Accept the truth and fix it.
reflection_question_en: Are you punishing yourself with guilt?
affirmation_en: I forgive myself and others to liberate my soul.
hook_en: Don't wait for the Reaper to knock before you realize... wake up now!
ritual_2min_en: Write down your regrets or guilt. Read it aloud once, then burn it (safely) to symbolize that you have paid your emotional debt.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:

reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, you will face a final test of your conviction, but maintaining your stance now guarantees undisputed success and recognition later.

tarot_imply_en: speed, movement, swift action, travel, rapid progress

standalone_future_en: What you are waiting for will arrive sooner than you think. Expect sudden good news, a spontaneous trip, or a project wrapping up at lightning speed. Momentum is totally on your side.

reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you navigated a whirlwind of events where life moved faster than you could process, setting a high-tempo pace that brought you here.

love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship is picking up speed; whether it's a spontaneous trip or rapid progress, embrace the passion and keep communication flowing freely to avoid misunderstandings.

career_present_en: Work is flooding in fast. Communication and coordination are key right now.

affirmation_en: I am open to the good news and success rushing towards me.
hook_en: Don't blink! Because great opportunities are incoming at light speed.

reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are prioritizing peace over victory, choosing to walk away from heated arguments or compromise just to end the exhausting drama.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, the dust will settle and clarity will return; you will find relief in moving away from constant friction toward a much quieter existence.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past conflicts have left you exhausted and craving peace. Choosing to end the dispute now will bring relief and a more harmonious fresh start in the future.

love_reading_couple_en: The storm is passing for your relationship as you both choose harmony over being right; letting go of the need to win will restore your connection.

tarot_imply_en: Fall from grace, Lack of recognition, Sore loser, Arrogance, Delayed success
standalone_past_en: You expected a parade but got an empty street. Maybe a victory didn't last, or you felt invisible despite your best efforts.
standalone_present_en: You feel like you are shouting into the void—working hard but getting zero credit. Or be careful: your ego might be tripping you up right now.
standalone_future_en: Don't chase applause; it might not come. If you don't lower your expectations and check your pride, you risk a public stumble.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past mistakes are eroding current confidence, or your ego is being tested. Without self-improvement, the future risks a repeat of disappointment.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, a public setback or fleeting victory shook your confidence, leaving you feeling unrecognized despite your best efforts.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you may feel undervalued despite your hard work, or your own arrogance might be pushing people away; check your ego before you lose ground.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, success may be delayed or credit given to others; learning to lose gracefully now will protect your reputation from greater damage later.
love_past_en: You were publicly rejected or humiliated by an ex in front of friends.
love_present_en: Feeling undervalued; your partner ignores you. Or perhaps you are being a 'drama queen/king' demanding too much attention.
love_future_en: Beware of self-sabotage due to arrogance, or love failing because you care more about public image than feelings.
love_reading_single_en: You might be seeking external validation to boost your ego, or feeling overlooked by potential partners; focus on building self-worth rather than demanding attention.
love_reading_couple_en: Tension may rise if one of you is acting superior or demanding constant praise; prioritize honest connection over looking perfect to the outside world.
career_past_en: Someone stole your credit, or a project you were confident in flopped badly.
career_present_en: Damned if you do, damned if you don't! Feeling unappreciated or being gossiped about behind your back.
career_future_en: Promotion might be frozen, or you must concede defeat to a rival. Learn to lose gracefully.
finance_past_en: You overspent treating friends to show off, or invested poorly due to overconfidence.
finance_present_en: Income isn't as flashy as you bragged. Beware of spending money just to maintain a social image.
finance_future_en: Expectations for bonuses or profits might fail; manage money with more humility.
action_prompt_en: Get off your high horse! Admit mistakes and fix them quietly rather than shouting and blaming others.
reflection_question_en: Do you want real success, or just 'praise' to feed your ego?

celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for the strength to finish what you started, yet you fear that if you stop being strong for even a moment, everything will fall apart.

tarot_imply_en: burden, heavy responsibility, exhaustion, carrying it all, near the finish line
standalone_past_en: You said 'yes' to everything and carried the weight of the world on your shoulders alone. Your dedication brought you here, but it left you exhausted.
standalone_present_en: It feels heavy, doesn't it? You are carrying a massive load right now, barely seeing the path ahead. Keep going, but realize you can't hold this pose forever.
standalone_future_en: Success is waiting at the top of the hill, but you must learn to put some bags down. If you keep carrying it all, you'll be too burnt out to enjoy the view.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past hard work has led to a present heavy load. However, this effort is leading to future success if you can manage the exhaustion.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you took on every responsibility yourself, and while that sheer grit brought you progress, it also established the exhausting pattern of carrying the world alone.
reading_summary_present_en: You are currently in the final, hardest stretch of the journey where the weight feels unbearable; keep going, but realize you cannot carry this load forever without collapsing.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, success awaits at the finish line, but only if you learn to delegate tasks now; otherwise, you risk reaching your goal completely burned out and unable to enjoy it.
love_past_en: You carried relationship problems alone or exhausted yourself trying to save the love.
love_present_en: Feeling weighed down; work burdens encroach on love, or the relationship feels like a chore.

celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is your refusal to delegate or simplify. You are over-identifying with the struggle, believing that you are the only one who can carry this, which is leading straight to burnout.

celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope that the hard work will finally pay off with total relief, but you fear that even after this ends, another heavy load will immediately take its place.

tarot_imply_en: Exhaustion, Giving up, Paranoia, Letting guard down, Stubbornness
standalone_past_en: You fought until you had nothing left to give. Past struggles left you exhausted and perhaps a bit too defensive, building walls that ended up trapping you instead of protecting you.
standalone_present_en: You are running on fumes. Paranoia or sheer exhaustion is making you see threats where there are none. It is okay to stop fighting for a moment; you don't have to be strong today.
standalone_future_en: If you refuse to lower your guard, you risk a total burnout. Stubbornness will only lead to collapse. Opening up to help is the only way to regain your strength.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you fought harder than your energy allowed, accumulating deep exhaustion or building defensive walls that eventually trapped you rather than protected you.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are dangerously close to burning out or letting paranoia paralyze your progress; continuing to fight without rest will only lead to collapse.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, success requires you to drop your heavy defenses and accept help; if you stubbornly refuse to yield, you risk total exhaustion.
reading_summary_preview_en: Accumulated exhaustion is making you weak and paranoid now. Without learning to yield and rest, the future risks surrender due to physical and mental collapse.
love_reading_single_en: Past hurts may have made you overly defensive, causing you to push potential connections away out of fear or sheer exhaustion.
love_reading_couple_en: You or your partner may be too drained to nurture the relationship right now; drop the paranoia and rest together before tension breaks you.
love_past_en: You were hurt so badly you dared not love again, or lived in a relationship of constant suspicion.
love_present_en: Paranoia is destroying the love. You might be accusing your partner unjustly, or you are simply too tired to maintain this relationship.
love_future_en: The walls you built might crumble, or you may decide to break up because you can't handle the pressure anymore.
career_past_en: You worked until you got sick, or battled colleagues until you lost heart.
career_present_en: Burned out. Feeling like you're fighting alone and unappreciated. Exhaustion may lead to mistakes.
career_future_en: Beware of quitting halfway, or being cornered into accepting unfair terms.
finance_past_en: You failed to protect assets and lost them, or financial stress caused insomnia.
finance_present_en: Guard down! Beware of money leaks due to carelessness, or missing opportunities due to excessive investment paranoia.
finance_future_en: You might have to pay a lump sum to resolve lingering issues, or accept a loss to close the chapter.
action_prompt_en: Admit you are tired. Drop your weapons and rest. Asking for help is not shameful.
reflection_question_en: Are you protecting yourself from enemies, or trapping yourself with fear?
affirmation_en: I am safe even when I am vulnerable.
hook_en: A person who acts defensive constantly is often the most scared... stop bracing for impact and let yourself rest.
ritual_2min_en: Soak your feet in warm salty water for 5 minutes to draw stress out. Imagine exhaustion flowing into the water, then pour it away.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What do you know you should let go of but are still gripping tight?
How does your exhaustion affect those around you?
If you gave up on this, would life really get worse?
keywords_light: Asking for help, Letting go, Trusting others, Recovery, Softening
keywords_shadow: Exhaustion, Paranoia, Giving up, Stubbornness, Defensiveness
image_alt_en: A weary cat dropping its staff and slumping against the fence of wands, looking defeated and tired, with bandages unraveling.

career_reading_single_en: You may feel like you've been guarding your post for too long without a break; it might be time to stop fighting every battle and just breathe.
finance_reading_single_en: Your financial defenses might be crumbling due to stress. Instead of worrying, try to simplify your spending and avoid impulsive 'comfort' purchases.
self_reading_single_en: It is okay to not be the 'strong one' today. Your inner self needs a soft place to land and permission to stop being so hyper-vigilant.
family_reading_single_en: Tensions at home might stem from shared exhaustion. Instead of getting defensive at each other, consider creating a quiet, low-energy space for everyone to recover.
travel_reading_single_en: Travel plans may feel more like a chore than a joy right now. If you do go, prioritize a very slow pace and plenty of 'do nothing' time.
health_reading_single_en: Your energy battery might be flashing red. It could be helpful to focus on gentle movement and making sure your nap schedule is a top priority.
self_past_en: You spent a long time being the lone guardian, building walls that were meant to protect you but ended up making you feel isolated.
self_present_en: The walls are coming down, and while it feels scary to be exposed, it is the only way to let fresh air and kindness back into your life.
self_future_en: You will eventually find strength in vulnerability, realizing that you don't have to stand guard 24/7 to be safe and loved.
family_past_en: Past conflicts may have left everyone feeling guarded and suspicious of each other's intentions within the domestic circle.
family_present_en: Someone in the family may be reaching a breaking point with their responsibilities; it might help to offer a gentle hand instead of a critique.
family_future_en: By letting go of old grudges, the family dynamic can shift from a battlefield to a cozy sunbeam where everyone can rest safely.
travel_past_en: Previous trips might have been marred by delays or a sense of having to remain constantly alert, leaving you more tired than before you left.
travel_present_en: Current travel plans may feel overwhelming or meet unexpected resistance; it might be wise to simplify the itinerary or postpone.
travel_future_en: Future travel will be most beneficial if it focuses on healing and sanctuary rather than checking items off a list.
health_past_en: You might have ignored small signs of fatigue for too long, pushing through until the physical body had no choice but to slow down.
health_present_en: Energy levels might feel low or inconsistent right now. Consider if more hydration or a slightly earlier bedtime could help your inner engine inner rhythm again.
health_future_en: If something feels unusual or persistent, it may be worth checking in with a professional to help put your mind at ease.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are operating on fumes, and the defensive walls you’ve built are starting to crumble. The central issue is pure, unadulterated burnout where the urge to give up is wrestling with the habit of staying on guard.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The friction here is your refusal to lay down your weapons even though the battle is over. You are fighting a ghost of a threat, and this paranoia is preventing you from receiving the help or rest you desperately need.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are trying to find a way to gracefully exit a stressful situation. You’re thinking about your boundaries and wondering if being the 'strong one' is actually worth the mounting cost to your health.
celtic_cross_below_en: Beneath the surface, there is a deep-seated fear of being vulnerable or seen as weak. This subconscious pattern makes you feel like any moment of rest is an opening for a person-sized disaster to strike.
celtic_cross_past_en: A recent period of relentless vigilance or a long-standing struggle has finally broken your resolve. You’ve been holding the line for too long, and that exhaustion is the direct cause of today’s instability.
celtic_cross_future_en: Expect a moment where the remaining defenses completely fail, forcing a total halt. This isn't a disaster, but a necessary collapse that will eventually lead to a more honest way of protecting your energy.
celtic_cross_self_en: You see yourself as a wounded soldier who can’t find the medical tent. There’s a sense of martyrdom here, as if you’re the only one who can keep this together, even as your hands start to shake.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The world around you feels demanding and insensitive to your fatigue. You may feel like others are waiting for you to drop the ball, or that the environment lacks any real safety net for you to land on.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for a total release from responsibility, yet you fear that letting your guard down will invite a betrayal or a loss of everything you’ve worked so hard to protect.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you continue to push, a forced burnout is inevitable. The trajectory leads to a period of recovery that is no longer optional; the universe will take the choice of working out of your hands to save your spirit.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Stop mending the fences and start mending your heart; the threat you fear is no longer active.

tarot_imply_en: Breaking point, Releasing burdens, Giving up, Delegating, Running away
standalone_past_en: You carried the weight of the world until your back nearly broke. That heavy burden you refused to share taught you a painful lesson about your own limits.
standalone_present_en: This is your breaking point. Your body and mind are screaming at you to stop. You cannot carry this anymore—drop the load now, or it will crush you.
standalone_future_en: A collapse is imminent if you don't delegate. But if you are brave enough to say 'no' and release these burdens, you will finally find the freedom to breathe again.
reading_summary_preview_en: Accumulated exhaustion is erupting now. You've reached your limit. Without releasing the burden, the future may force a long break for self-repair.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you pushed yourself beyond your limits until you either collapsed or were forced to drop everything, leaving you with a harsh lesson about overextension.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you have reached a critical breaking point where your body and mind are refusing to cooperate; you must drop some responsibilities today or risk a total shutdown.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, if you refuse to delegate, you face severe burnout that will halt your progress; however, choosing to let go now will allow you to recover and move faster.
love_past_en: You carried your partner's problems until you got sick, or fled a relationship that was too heavy to bear.
love_present_en: Love feels like a chain around your neck. You feel suffocated and want to escape, or you are dumping all relationship responsibilities onto your partner.
love_future_en: Without mutual support, the relationship will collapse, or one side will snap and ask to break up.
love_reading_single_en: You may be too exhausted from other life burdens to handle dating right now. Focus on healing your burnout first; you cannot carry a new relationship while your hands are full of old baggage.
love_reading_couple_en: The relationship feels overwhelmingly heavy, possibly because one person is carrying the entire load. If you don't address this imbalance immediately, the urge to escape or break up will grow stronger.
career_past_en: You worked until you collapsed at your desk, or quit suddenly because the pressure was unbearable.
career_present_en: Overwhelmed and missing deadlines. You might be dropping tasks or dumping them on colleagues irresponsibly. Beware of losing credibility.
career_future_en: Forcing yourself to do everything alone will lead to project failure. Learn to utilize people and trust your team.
finance_past_en: Overwhelmed by debt to the point of evasion, or shouldering others' expenses until you were in trouble.
finance_present_en: Cash flow crisis. Debt burden is excessive, leading to missed payments. Negotiate debt restructuring immediately.
finance_future_en: You might have to liquidate assets to lighten the load, or face bankruptcy if not fixed soon.
action_prompt_en: Drop it now! Don't regret what you've carried. If it stops you from moving forward, it's useless to keep.
reflection_question_en: Whose expectations are you carrying, and why are you afraid to put them down?
affirmation_en: I love myself enough to say no to what is beyond my limits.
hook_en: How can you fight with a broken back? Put it down, for goodness sake.
ritual_2min_en: Hold a rock or heavy object until your arm aches. Drop it on the ground. Hear the thud! Imagine your mental burden falling away just like that.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What task do you hate but keep forcing yourself to do?
If you got sick today, who would replace you (if no one, your life system is broken)?
What do you want to 'dump' the most right now?
keywords_light: Delegation, Relief, Letting go, Stress management, Asking for help
keywords_shadow: Collapse, Burnout, Resentment, Running away, Heavy burden

self_reading_single_en: You've been carrying too much emotional weight lately. It is perfectly okay to put the logs down and just rest for a while; you don't have to carry the world on your furry shoulders.
family_reading_single_en: Family expectations might feel like a heavy burden right now. Letting go of the need to please everyone could be the key to reclaiming your personal peace of mind.
travel_reading_single_en: Travel plans might feel more like an exhausting chore than a vacation. If a trip feels too draining to organize, it might be worth simplifying the itinerary or choosing a more restful destination.
health_reading_single_en: Your energy levels may feel quite low due to accumulated stress. Pacing yourself and prioritizing deep rest might help your body recover; if something feels persistent, a quick check-up could be beneficial.
self_past_en: You recently pushed through a period of extreme self-sacrifice that left you feeling drained.
self_present_en: You are currently navigating the aftermath of over-commitment and learning where to draw the line.
self_future_en: Future clarity will come as you master the art of saying 'no' and protecting your inner peace.
family_past_en: You might have felt solely responsible for everyone else's happiness for a long time.
family_present_en: You are beginning to realize that you cannot carry the whole family's emotional burdens alone.
family_future_en: Setting healthy boundaries will eventually lead to a lighter and more authentic family dynamic.
travel_past_en: Previous journeys may have been rushed or burdened by too many responsibilities.
travel_present_en: You might feel too exhausted to even think about going anywhere right now; rest is your priority.
travel_future_en: Future travel will be much more refreshing if you pack light and avoid over-scheduling your days.
health_past_en: In the past, you may have ignored your body's subtle signals while trying to get things done.
health_present_en: It might be a good time to listen to your body and provide the extra hydration and sleep it needs.
health_future_en: Consistent pacing and gentle movements could help maintain your energy levels in the long run.
celtic_cross_present_en: The sticks are falling. You’ve reached a point where the weight is simply too great to manage, and the current atmosphere is defined by the messy, necessary process of dropping what you can no longer carry.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is the guilt and chaos that comes with sudden release. You might be dropping responsibilities in a way that creates friction with others, or struggling to admit that you aren't a superhero who can do it all.
celtic_cross_above_en: Mentally, you are focusing on ways to streamline your life. You are consciously looking for the exits, trying to figure out which tasks are essential and which are just heavy vanity projects.
celtic_cross_below_en: Underneath, there’s a subconscious belief that your value is measured by your suffering. You may be sabotaging your own relief because part of you feels 'unproductive' or unworthy when you aren't overwhelmed.
celtic_cross_past_en: You recently hit a peak of over-commitment where you said 'yes' to one too many things. That excessive drive for achievement is the reason your arms are giving out today.
celtic_cross_future_en: A significant relief is coming, but it might feel like a collapse before it feels like freedom. You are about to be unburdened, whether you choose to be or if circumstances choose it for you.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are currently showing up as someone who is done with the struggle but doesn't quite know how to put the load down gracefully. You’re tired, perhaps a bit resentful, and ready to walk away from the pile.
celtic_cross_environment_en: Your surroundings are likely messy or unsupportive, reflecting the external pressure that put those wands in your hands in the first place. Others may be looking on as you struggle, unsure of how to help.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You desperately hope for a simpler life, but you fear that once the wands are gone, there will be nothing left of your identity or that people will see you as lazy.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you continue on this path, the situation will resolve through a total shedding of the unnecessary. You will find yourself with empty hands, which is exactly what you need to start building something sustainable.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Drop the sticks intentionally before they fall and break your toes; delegation is your only salvation.

standalone_present_en: Procrastination is winning today. You know what you need to do, but you just can't find the spark. Stop acting like a bored child—waiting for 'inspiration' is just an excuse.
standalone_future_en: If you keep drifting without focus, your goals will remain daydreams. You risk missing out on something great simply because you didn't show up with enough enthusiasm.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, impulsive decisions or disappointing news drained your enthusiasm, leaving you hesitant to start fresh.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are battling procrastination or boredom; delaying your responsibilities might feel safe, but it is slowly damaging your credibility.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, if you remain passive or childish, you risk watching great opportunities slip away; you must actively reignite your drive.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past impatience or disappointment has made you sluggish now. Without reigniting your fire and taking responsibility, the future risks missed opportunities and failure.
love_reading_single_en: You may be attracting inconsistent people or feeling too uninspired to date seriously; be careful not to send mixed signals yourself.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship feels a bit immature or flaky right now; one of you needs to stop breaking small promises to restore trust.

finance_future_en: You might have to rely on others' money for a while, or expected income won't arrive on time.

family_present_en: A lack of communication might make things feel a bit tense; try to listen as much as you meow.
family_future_en: Peace returns when everyone stops acting like stubborn kittens and starts taking shared responsibilities seriously.
travel_past_en: Previous trips might have been marred by poor planning or a sudden loss of interest halfway through.
travel_present_en: You might be feeling hesitant about a current journey or finding it hard to get excited about the destination.
travel_future_en: Future adventures will go smoother if you pack a little more patience and a lot more organization.

celtic_cross_present_en: The fire is flickering but failing to catch. The current atmosphere is one of distraction, where many ideas are floating around but none have the momentum or maturity to turn into a real project.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: Your challenge is a lack of focus and a tendency to jump from one shiny object to the next. This 'eternal beginner' energy is preventing you from making any real progress because you’re bored before the hard work starts.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are hunting for inspiration, perhaps waiting for a 'sign' or a perfect idea to strike. You’re thinking about your potential, but your mental framing is more about the fantasy than the execution.
celtic_cross_below_en: Subconsciously, there is a fear of being 'cringey' or failing once things get serious. By staying in the shallow end of many pools, you protect yourself from the risk of deep-water failure.

celtic_cross_future_en: Expect a delay in news or a minor creative setback. Something you were waiting for might arrive in a disappointing form, requiring you to rethink your approach rather than just following a whim.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are acting like a distracted younger self, chasing every laser point but catching nothing. Your self-image is tied to being 'creative,' but your current output is more about talk than action.

celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for a sudden breakthrough that feels like magic, but you fear that you’re actually just a dilettante with no real substance or lasting passion.

celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Pick one spark and feed it until it’s a fire; stop blowing out your own candles just to light new ones.

tarot_imply_en: Recklessness, Impatience, Lack of direction, Burnout, Failed venture
standalone_past_en: You rushed in without a plan and likely tripped over your own feet. That reckless impulse to just 'go' without looking at the map caused more chaos than progress.
standalone_present_en: You are moving fast, but are you getting anywhere? Your energy is scattered and frantic right now. Slow down—rushing blindly will only lead to a crash.
standalone_future_en: Unless you pull back on the reins, you're heading for a dead end or an abrupt cancellation. Success requires direction, not just speed.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past impatience has led to present confusion and lack of direction. Without mindfulness and energy control, the future risks failure or stagnation.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, your impulsive actions and lack of foresight led to burnout or unnecessary mistakes, teaching you that speed without direction is dangerous.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are scattering your energy in too many directions, risking burnout or mistakes if you don't pause to regain your focus.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, unless you slow down and strategize, you risk running into a dead end or facing abrupt cancellations due to poor preparation.
love_reading_single_en: You may be attracting intense but unreliable connections, so be wary of people who rush in with passion but lack the maturity to stay.
love_reading_couple_en: Impatience or scattered energy is creating tension in your relationship; avoid picking fights just to release steam and try to listen before reacting.
love_past_en: You had a superficial, wham-bam-thank-you-ma'am relationship, or dealt with a player who broke your heart.
love_present_en: Love is rocky due to hot tempers, or one partner is selfish and irresponsible. Beware of someone looking for a fling and then ghosting.
love_future_en: The relationship might end abruptly due to boredom or intense arguments.
career_past_en: You made mistakes by rushing, or quit a job without a backup plan.
career_present_en: Chaotic work but nothing gets finished (Busy but not productive), or being criticized for carelessness.
career_future_en: Beware of projects collapsing due to lack of planning, or an involuntary job transfer.
finance_past_en: Money was lost on gambling or excessively high-risk investments.
finance_present_en: Hot money! Easy come, easy go; can't save. Beware of impulsive spending.
finance_future_en: Financial trouble may arise from negligence, or travel that blows the budget.
action_prompt_en: Calm down! Pull back the reins and check the map before riding on. Do not act rashly.
reflection_question_en: Are you running away from problems, or running straight into disaster?
affirmation_en: I use my energy mindfully and with purpose.
hook_en: Rush and you'll fall off the horse... slow down, speed racer.

journal_prompt_3lines_en:
