What is your goal (answer clearly in 1 sentence)?
Why do you feel so restless right now?
keywords_light: Self-control, slowing down, planning, rethinking, channeling energy
keywords_shadow: Recklessness, impulsiveness, burnout, scattered energy, arrogance
image_alt_en: A knight falling off a bucking horse, dropping the wand, looking disheveled and frustrated in a desert storm.
illustration_prompt_en: A ginger cat knight being thrown off a bucking chestnut horse, dropping a wooden wand, armor clattering, sandstorm blowing in the desert background, chaotic and disoriented, art nouveau style, muted orange and brown tones --ar 2:3
meta_description_en: Knight of Wands Reversed tarot meaning: Recklessness, impatience, and lack of direction. Learn to control your energy and avoid burnout.
career_reading_single_en: You might feel like you're spinning your wheels without getting anywhere. Take a moment to reorganize your tasks before frustration takes over.
finance_reading_single_en: Impulse spending might be tempting right now as a way to vent stress. Try to keep your hands off the 'buy now' button until you've had a chance to sleep on it.
self_reading_single_en: Your inner fire might be flickering or scattering in too many directions. Gentle grounding and focusing on one small thing at a time could help you feel more centered.
family_reading_single_en: There may be some restless energy or minor misunderstandings at home. Staying calm and avoiding hasty words can keep the domestic atmosphere cozy and sweet.
travel_reading_single_en: Travel plans might encounter a few hiccups or feel a bit rushed. Double-checking your itinerary and leaving plenty of time for rest could make the journey much smoother.
health_reading_single_en: You might be feeling a bit low on energy or slightly scattered. Prioritizing gentle rest and making sure you stay hydrated could help your body find its natural rhythm again.
self_past_en: You may have recently experienced a period of rushing through things, which might have left you feeling a little depleted.
self_present_en: Your current energy might feel a bit uncoordinated; taking a slow breath and refocusing on your core needs could be very beneficial.
self_future_en: A steadier and more mindful pace is waiting for you, which could lead to a much more satisfying sense of progress.
family_past_en: Past interactions within the family might have felt a bit impulsive or lacked clear direction.
family_present_en: Right now, someone in your circle might need a little extra patience and a non-judgmental ear.
family_future_en: Future family dynamics may improve as you collectively learn to slow down and value quality time over quick results.
travel_past_en: A previous trip may have been marked by unexpected changes or a sense of being somewhat unprepared.
travel_present_en: It might be wise to look over your travel arrangements carefully to ensure everything is aligned with your comfort.
travel_future_en: Future travels could be more restorative if you choose destinations that allow for a slower, more relaxed pace.
health_past_en: You may have been ignoring your body's subtle signals for rest while trying to keep up with a fast-paced schedule.
health_present_en: Focusing on simple things like consistent sleep and gentle movement might help support your overall well-being right now.
health_future_en: By gradually establishing a more balanced routine, you might find your vitality returning in a more sustainable way.
celtic_cross_present_en: Energy is high but directionless; you are likely running in circles or starting things without the stamina to finish them.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: Your main obstacle is pure impatience—a tendency to force a pace that the situation isn't ready to sustain yet.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Stop the frantic movement and find a single focal point before you dissipate all your creative fire.
celtic_cross_above_en: You are consciously trying to break free or make a grand entrance, obsessed with the idea of immediate progress.
celtic_cross_below_en: Underneath, there is a fear of being 'boring' or a deeper restlessness that makes sitting still feel like a failure.
celtic_cross_past_en: A recent burst of enthusiasm was poorly managed, leading to the current state of burnout or scattered focus.
celtic_cross_future_en: Expect a sudden halt or a realization that your current path is unsustainable without a more grounded strategy.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are showing up with restless, unpredictable energy: fast, reactive, and prone to knocking things over by accident.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The surroundings are chaotic, filled with people who are also rushing or making demands without offering any stability.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for a thrill that changes everything, yet you fear that you’re actually just wasting your time.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If this frantic pace continues, the energy will likely fizzle out into a frustrating stalemate or a missed opportunity.

tarot_imply_en: Jealousy, Demanding attention, Insecurity, Temperamental, Withdrawal
standalone_past_en: You felt ignored or overshadowed, which hurt your pride deeply. Alternatively, you might have pushed people away by being overly demanding or dramatic.
standalone_present_en: You might be lashing out because you feel insecure inside. Whether it's jealousy or a temper tantrum, this drama is just a cry for attention. You don't need to scream to be worthy.
standalone_future_en: If you don't tame that temper, you'll end up isolated. True confidence is quiet; if you keep demanding validation from others, you will only push them further away.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past insecurities are fueling present emotional outbursts. Without learning proper self-love, the future risks loneliness due to demanding behavior.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you may have pushed people away with controlling behavior or suffered a blow to your ego that still makes you feel undervalued today.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, you are battling feelings of insecurity or jealousy; avoid lashing out to get attention and focus on healing your inner spark instead.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, failing to manage your temper could lead to social isolation; true radiance returns only when you stop seeking external validation.
love_reading_single_en: You may be projecting insecurity right now, risking coming across as too needy or attracting partners who match your emotional volatility.
love_reading_couple_en: Tension may rise if you let jealousy or a need for constant pampering dictate your behavior; give your partner space to breathe.
love_past_en: Your jealousy wrecked a relationship, or you were dumped for being manipulative and demanding.
love_present_en: Beware of ruining love with paranoia or demanding constant pampering until your partner gets annoyed.
love_future_en: You might need some alone time to fix your attitude, or you'll meet a karmic partner who matches your volatility.
career_past_en: You clashed with colleagues due to arrogance or were gossiped about for trying to outshine everyone.
career_present_en: Feeling irrelevant, disrespected, or jealous of a colleague who is doing better than you.
career_future_en: Reputation may suffer due to emotional outbursts, or your role will be diminished because of a negative attitude.
finance_past_en: You went broke buying luxury items just to show off.
finance_present_en: Finances are tight, but you still want the high life. Beware of debt incurred just to keep up appearances.
finance_future_en: You might have to sell off designer items or downgrade your lifestyle due to cash flow issues.
action_prompt_en: Stop comparing yourself to others! Refill your own cup instead of being jealous of someone else's.
reflection_question_en: Are you demanding attention because you feel 'empty' inside?
affirmation_en: I am valuable as I am, without trying to be like anyone else.
hook_en: The person who acts the most defensive is usually the most scared... lower your guard and let's talk.
ritual_2min_en: Go offline for 1 hour to stop comparing yourself. Use that time to do a face mask or body scrub in quiet self-care.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What makes you most jealous of others?
Who do you lash out at, and why?
How can you regain confidence without relying on social media likes?
keywords_light: Self-reflection, Modesty, Inner validation, Emotional healing, Authenticity
keywords_shadow: Jealousy, Insecurity, Vanity, Bullying, Spitefulness
image_alt_en: A black cat looking into a mirror and hissing at its own reflection, with withered sunflowers in the background.
illustration_prompt_en: A black cat hissing at its reflection in an ornate golden mirror, withered sunflowers in a vase, dark stormy background, mood of insecurity and anger, art nouveau style, dark orange and grey tones --ar 2:3
meta_description_en: Queen of Wands Reversed tarot meaning: Jealousy, insecurity, and demanding attention. Learn how to overcome the drama and find true self-worth.
career_reading_single_en: You may feel overshadowed or undervalued at work right now. Try not to let professional jealousy dim your spark; focus on your own unique path instead.
finance_reading_single_en: Be mindful of spending to impress others or fill an emotional gap. True security comes from within, not from the labels we wear.
self_reading_single_en: This is a time for gentle introspection. You might be seeking external praise because you've forgotten how to cheer for yourself.
family_reading_single_en: Tensions at home might arise from everyone wanting to be heard at once. A little extra patience and a soft tone can help calm the domestic den.
travel_reading_single_en: Travel plans might feel a bit stressful if expectations are too high. A low-key trip focused on relaxation rather than 'performing' for photos might be best.
health_reading_single_en: You might feel your energy levels are a bit low or reactive. Consider prioritizing consistent sleep and gentle stretching to help find your balance.
self_past_en: You recently went through a phase where your confidence was shaky, perhaps relying too much on how others perceived you.
self_present_en: Currently, you are learning to sit with your shadow side and understand that you don't always have to be the loudest in the room to be important.
self_future_en: You will soon rediscover a quiet, steady confidence that doesn't need to bark or get defensive to be felt by others.
family_past_en: There may have been some dramatic outbursts or power struggles within your inner circle that left everyone feeling a bit exhausted.
family_present_en: Right now, focus on being a calming presence. Small gestures of kindness can help mend any frayed connections with loved ones.
family_future_en: Healing is on the horizon as you learn to lead with your heart rather than your ego within your family dynamic.
travel_past_en: A previous journey might have been marred by a bad mood or a feeling that things weren't 'perfect' enough for the gallery.
travel_present_en: If you travel now, keep it simple. Over-scheduling might lead to burnout, so leave plenty of room for spontaneous person naps.
travel_future_en: Future trips will be much more fulfilling when you stop worrying about the destination and start enjoying your own company.
health_past_en: In the past, emotional stress might have manifested as physical fatigue, suggesting a need for more internal nurturing.
health_present_en: Listening to your body’s quiet signals is key. If you feel a bit ‘fizzled out,’ it might be a good time for extra hydration and soft music.
health_future_en: With a focus on self-kindness, your vitality can return to a steady, warm glow that lasts much longer than a sudden spark.
celtic_cross_present_en: Your inner light feels slightly dimmed or guarded, often manifesting as moodiness or a withdrawal from your usual social spark.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The friction comes from a lack of self-confidence masked by defensiveness or an overly controlling attitude toward others.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Lower your instincts and stop treating every interaction like a competition for the spotlight.
celtic_cross_above_en: You are focusing on how you are perceived by others, perhaps worrying too much about your status or reputation.
celtic_cross_below_en: Beneath the surface, there is an old wound regarding jealousy or a fear that you aren't actually 'enough' without an audience.
celtic_cross_past_en: A period of high visibility or intense creativity has left you feeling depleted and sensitive to criticism.
celtic_cross_future_en: A social misunderstanding or a brief blow to your ego is approaching, requiring you to find internal rather than external validation.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are acting as if you are someone whose composure has been rubbed the wrong way—irritable, sensitive, and ready to get defensive at the smallest slight.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The environment feels competitive or exclusionary, making it hard for you to feel like the warm, welcoming leader you usually are.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You desire to be worshipped and adored, but you dread the possibility of being overshadowed by someone 'fresher'.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: The path leads toward a necessary period of re-centering where you must learn to shine for yourself, not for the crowd.

tarot_imply_en: leadership, vision, inspiration, success, entrepreneurship
standalone_past_en: You forged your own path through decisive action. Your past experiences have shaped you into a leader who commands respect, not just demands it.
standalone_present_en: You are sitting on the throne of your own life. Your vision is clear, and your energy is inspiring others. It's time to execute the big plan.
standalone_future_en: High-level success is on the horizon. You are building an empire—whether in career or personal life—that will stand tall and bring you lasting reputation.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past leadership experience strengthens you today, and your vision will guide you toward immense success and prosperity in the future.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you forged your own path through decisive action and bold leadership, laying the strong foundation of respect and experience you stand upon today.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are in a position of power and high energy; seize this moment to lead with confidence and drive your major projects across the finish line.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, your vision will materialize into high-level success; continue to lead with integrity and you will reach the pinnacle of your personal or professional empire.
love_past_en: You had a passionate relationship with a strong leader, or you were the one calling the shots.
love_present_en: Love is stable yet passionate. Your partner might be talented and charismatic, or you are the magnet.
love_future_en: You will find a partner who supports you in every way, a true co-pilot in building a stable future.
love_reading_single_en: Your natural charisma is magnetic right now; stand tall in your confidence to attract a partner who admires your strength and matches your fiery ambition.
love_reading_couple_en: Your partnership is evolving into a dynamic power couple vibe; keep the passion alive by supporting each other's ambitions and leading together towards shared goals.
career_past_en: You successfully managed a major operation or pioneered a significant initiative.
career_present_en: Time to lead the troops! Make decisive calls, give clear orders, and your team will rally behind you.
career_future_en: You will become a successful business owner or a high-level executive with far-reaching vision.
finance_past_en: You made bold investments that paid off handsomely.
finance_present_en: Take a long-term view on finances. Invest wisely and diversify your portfolio.
finance_future_en: Wealth will come from leadership and building your own empire.
action_prompt_en: Take the lead! Don't wait to be told what to do. You set the direction; trust your instincts.
reflection_question_en: What is your grandest vision for this year, and have you started executing it?
affirmation_en: I am a powerful leader with a broad and inspiring vision.
hook_en: A king doesn't just sit on a throne; he builds the kingdom with his own hands.
ritual_2min_en: Sit straight in your chair. Imagine wearing a fiery red cape. Breathe deep to awaken your authority and confidence before starting work.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
How do you define a 'good leader'?
What project do you want to spearhead yourself?
What is your unique way of inspiring others?
keywords_light: leadership, vision, entrepreneur, honor, charisma
keywords_shadow: impulsive, ruthless, domineering, high expectations, arrogant

illustration_prompt_en: A majestic lion-like ginger cat sitting confidently on a golden throne decorated with salamander carvings, holding a large flowering wand, bright orange and yellow background representing fire and sunset, art nouveau style, regal.

career_reading_single_en: You are in the driver's seat; take bold initiatives and inspire your team. This is the time to build your empire, not just follow orders.
finance_reading_single_en: Financial success comes from taking charge. Consider bold investments or starting a side hustle where you call the shots; fortune favors the brave.
self_reading_single_en: Step into your power and own the room. Your natural charisma and confidence are your greatest assets right now—let your inner lion roar!
family_reading_single_en: You are the rock of your family. Guide them with warmth and strength, acting as the protective leader of your pride who keeps everyone safe.
travel_reading_single_en: A trip for business or a leadership retreat is likely. You will be the one planning the itinerary and leading the adventure for everyone.
health_reading_single_en: Your energy is vibrant right now, but remember to balance that inner fire with moments of rest. Pacing yourself will help you stay refreshed and steady.
self_past_en: You forged your strong identity through past challenges, learning to stand tall even when alone.
self_present_en: You radiate authority and warmth; people naturally look to you for direction, so lead by example.
self_future_en: You will evolve into a respected mentor or elder, leaving a legacy of wisdom and strength.
family_past_en: You took on significant responsibility early on, perhaps acting as the head of the household prematurely.
family_present_en: You are the decision-maker of the house; your firm but loving guidance keeps the family united.
family_future_en: Your efforts will establish a strong family legacy, ensuring security and status for your loved ones.
travel_past_en: You have traveled to expand your vision, seeking opportunities rather than just leisure.
travel_present_en: You are leading a group trip or traveling for important business negotiations.
travel_future_en: You will expand your horizons to new territories, possibly establishing a base in a faraway place.
health_past_en: Robust energy and a fiery spirit carried you through past physical challenges.
health_present_en: You may be carrying some extra tension or heat lately. Taking a few moments to cool down and breathe deeply can help you feel more centered.
health_future_en: Finding a sustainable rhythm for light movement and rest will likely be beneficial. Tuning into your body's signals helps keep your energy steady.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are currently in a position of executive power, looking at the big picture and making bold decisions that define the path forward.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is tunnel vision; you are so focused on the grand legacy that you might be neglecting the vital details or the feelings of those following you.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are preoccupied with leadership, legacy, and the desire to build something that outlasts your current efforts.
celtic_cross_below_en: There is a deep-seated drive to conquer and command, rooted in a past need to establish your authority and never be controlled by others again.
celtic_cross_past_en: You have recently stepped into a role of significant influence or achieved a victory that confirmed your visionary status.
celtic_cross_future_en: A situation is approaching that will require you to act as the ultimate authority and take a high-stakes gamble on your own vision.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are showing up as the seasoned visionary—confident, assertive, and unwilling to settle for anything less than total success.
celtic_cross_environment_en: Your environment is high-stakes and demanding, with peers and subordinates alike looking to you for direction and stability.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope to be remembered as a pioneer, yet you fear the loneliness that comes with being the one at the top who has to make all the hard calls.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you maintain your focus, the situation will culminate in a significant achievement that solidifies your position as a master of your craft.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Don't rule with an iron hand; remember that a great leader inspires through vision rather than just commanding order.

tarot_imply_en: new love, overflowing emotion, healing, intuition, emotional opportunity
standalone_past_en: You recently felt a surge of emotion or a spiritual awakening that touched your soul. It was a beautiful beginning that softened your heart.
standalone_present_en: Your heart is wide open and overflowing. You are more sensitive and intuitive than usual—let those feelings flow, they are healing you.
standalone_future_en: A new chapter of deep emotional fulfillment is beginning. Whether it’s a new romance, a pregnancy, or a creative birth, your cup will run over with joy.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past openness has prepared you to receive love fully now, leading to new relationships or overflowing happiness in the future.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you opened your heart to a fresh emotional experience or healing moment, planting the seeds for the deep feelings you carry now.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now your emotions are flowing freely and your heart is open; it is a perfect moment to express your feelings and trust your intuition.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, a new cycle of emotional fulfillment or a deep connection awaits you, bringing joy that feels spiritually complete.
love_past_en: Just developed a crush, or the relationship entered a sweet honeymoon phase.
love_present_en: Falling hard! Extremely sensitive and romantic, ready to pour your heart out.
love_future_en: New love awaits, or the current relationship will deepen into profound understanding.
love_reading_single_en: You are radiating approachable and magnetic energy, making this an excellent time to meet someone new who truly connects with your heart.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship is ready for emotional renewal; sharing your true feelings now will bring you closer and deepen your bond.
career_past_en: Started a job you love or found inspiration for artistic creation.
career_present_en: Working with heart over head. The workplace atmosphere is supportive and understanding.
career_future_en: You will get a fulfilling job, or a passion project will succeed beautifully.
finance_past_en: You willingly helped others financially out of kindness.
finance_present_en: Spending on loved ones or charity. Money flows in and out like water.
finance_future_en: Abundance will come with joy, not just numbers in a bank account.
action_prompt_en: Uncork your heart! Let your feelings flow and share your love with those around you.
reflection_question_en: What makes your inner cup overflow with joy?
affirmation_en: I am open to the love and joy flowing into my life.
hook_en: When the water rises, collect it... when love rises, embrace it.
ritual_2min_en: Drink a glass of water slowly. Visualize it as pink love energy flowing into your body, washing away negativity and filling your heart.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
Who do you want to say 'I love you' to right now?
What is a good feeling you received recently?
How will you show kindness to yourself today?
keywords_light: love, compassion, creativity, new feelings, intuition
keywords_shadow: emotional overwhelm, blocked creativity, emptiness, repressed feelings
image_alt_en: A white cat gazes up at a giant golden chalice filled with glowing water, hovering above a lotus pond, with a white dove descending from above under a serene sky.
illustration_prompt_en: A mystical white cat sits at the edge of a tranquil lotus-filled pond, gazing up in awe at a giant golden chalice hovering above the water. The chalice is brimming with still, glowing water that shines softly from within, but no streams spill out; the surface shimmers with light and tiny sparkles, suggesting deep emotion held gently in place. Above the cup, a white dove descends gracefully, carrying a small wafer, with soft rays of light forming a subtle halo around it. Water lilies and gentle ripples surround the cat's paws, and the background shows a serene blue sky with soft clouds and faint rainbow-like mist. The entire scene is framed by an ornate Art Nouveau border with flowing lines and floral motifs, using blues, golds, and pink accents in the MeowTarot cat tarot illustration style.
meta_description_en: Ace of Cups Tarot meaning by MeowTarot: Embrace new love, emotional beginnings, and creativity. See what this overflowing card brings.
career_reading_single_en: Your work life is being infused with fresh creative energy. It is the perfect time to start a passion project or follow your heart in your career path.
finance_reading_single_en: Abundance flows when you open your heart. Generosity creates good karma, and money might arrive through creative or caring channels.
self_reading_single_en: You are overflowing with self-love and intuition. Trust your inner voice and treat yourself with the same kindness you offer others.
family_reading_single_en: Joy and harmony fill your home. This is a beautiful omen for emotional bonding, pregnancy, or welcoming a new family member (maybe a younger self!).
travel_reading_single_en: A journey to places near water—be it the ocean, a lake, or a river—will deeply refresh your soul and wash away any stress.
health_reading_single_en: Your emotional well-being is gently supporting your physical energy. Soft, hydrating activities or time near water may feel very restorative now.
self_past_en: You recently went through an emotional awakening or a significant healing moment that softened your heart.
self_present_en: Your cup is full; practice self-care and let your emotions flow freely without holding back.
self_future_en: You will reach a state of deep spiritual contentment and emotional wholeness.
family_past_en: Past forgiveness or a heartfelt reconnection brought peace to your family circle.
family_present_en: Celebration is in the air! Good news regarding children, pregnancy, or a happy gathering is likely.
family_future_en: Your family bonds will deepen into unconditional love and long-lasting harmony.
travel_past_en: A past trip brought you unexpected inspiration or emotional relief.
travel_present_en: Head to the water. A vacation near the sea or a quiet lake is exactly what your spirit needs now.
travel_future_en: A spiritual pilgrimage or a journey of the heart awaits, bringing profound inner peace.
health_past_en: You may have recently prioritized resting and listening more closely to your body’s emotional needs.
health_present_en: A sense of vitality is returning. This is a lovely time to focus on emotional balance and gentle pacing in your daily routine.
health_future_en: You may look forward to a period of inner radiance and balance, feeling more refreshed and grounded overall.
celtic_cross_present_en: A fresh spring of emotion is bubbling up within you, signaling a new chapter of the heart. You are currently in a state of 'emotional reset,' where your cup is being filled with pure, unfiltered potential for love and creativity.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The sheer volume of new emotion is overwhelming, making it hard to keep your hands on the ground. The challenge is in the vulnerability—opening your heart so wide that you feel exposed or struggle to contain the intensity.
celtic_cross_above_en: You are consciously seeking emotional fulfillment and a sense of 'oneness' with your surroundings. Your mind is focused on healing, forgiveness, and the idealistic pursuit of a truly soul-nourishing connection.
celtic_cross_below_en: Underneath it all, a deep-seated need for emotional security and spiritual nourishment is driving your actions. Your subconscious is finally ready to let go of old droughts and embrace the flow of unconditional love.
celtic_cross_past_en: A recent epiphany or a moment of deep emotional clarity has cleared the way for this new beginning. You have recently experienced a breakthrough that allowed your heart to soften and your intuition to sharpen.
celtic_cross_future_en: A significant emotional opportunity is approaching, likely involving a new relationship or a creative birth. Expect a period where your feelings will find a beautiful, tangible vessel to flow into.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are showing up with your heart on your sleeve, radiating a soft, receptive energy. You are the vessel right now—open, intuitive, and ready to offer your kindness to the world without expectation.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The world around you feels unusually supportive and emotionally resonant right now. You are in a space where kindness is mirrored back to you, and the atmosphere is ripe for deep, intuitive connections.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You long for a love that feels like a spiritual homecoming, yet you fear that this peak of joy might be temporary or 'too good to be true.' There is a lurking anxiety about whether you can sustain this high vibration.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you follow this current, you will reach a state of profound inner peace and emotional abundance. The situation is leading toward a genuine awakening where your heart feels completely and authentically full.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Don't try to bottle up the overflow; let the feelings pass through you like water rather than trying to own or control them.

standalone_past_en: You met someone who just 'clicked' instantly, or you healed a rift with a loved one. That moment of connection sparked something real.
standalone_present_en: The world revolves around this connection right now. Whether in love or business, you are perfectly in sync with another person. It feels effortless.
standalone_future_en: This relationship is deepening into a serious commitment. You are moving towards a true partnership where two become a powerful one.
reading_summary_preview_en: The connection formed in the past creates present harmony and understanding, serving as a vital foundation for this relationship to grow steadily in the future.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you formed a genuine connection or reconciled with someone, establishing a moment of perfect harmony and mutual understanding that set the stage for today.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are experiencing a moment of perfect alignment where feelings and goals are mutually shared; open yourself to this flow of connection.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, this connection is likely to deepen into a significant commitment or partnership that brings long-term emotional fulfillment and shared success.
love_past_en: You shared sweet memories with someone or just started talking and felt a great vibe.
love_present_en: Mutual feelings! If single, you'll meet a soulmate. If taken, love is as sweet as the honeymoon phase.
love_future_en: The relationship will advance; there is a high chance of a serious commitment.
love_reading_single_en: You are in a prime energy to meet someone who feels like a soulmate; open your heart, as a genuine and mutual connection is closer than you think.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship is entering a beautiful phase of harmony; it is the perfect time to share your deepest feelings and enjoy this mutual sync.
career_past_en: You worked with a partner who understood you well, or had a smooth negotiation.
career_present_en: Excellent cooperation from colleagues or finding a trustworthy business partner.
career_future_en: Signing contracts or agreements will go smoothly; a win-win for both sides.

finance_present_en: Finances are balanced. Someone might offer help or give you a gift.
finance_future_en: Joint investments will yield satisfying profits; financial status improves with a partner.

journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What are 3 qualities you look for in a 'partner' (work or love)?
What does your ideal relationship look like?
Are you ready to be a giver as much as a receiver?
keywords_light: partnership, unity, soulmates, attraction, harmony
keywords_shadow: imbalance, broken trust, co-dependency, arguments, disconnection
image_alt_en: Two affectionate cats touching noses, their tails forming a heart shape, holding two golden cups with intertwined steam rising up.
illustration_prompt_en: Two affectionate cats (one white, one black) sitting facing each other and touching noses, tails forming a heart shape, holding golden chalices with intertwining pink steam rising above, soft pastel background, romantic art nouveau style.
meta_description_en: Two of Cups Tarot meaning by MeowTarot: Discover soulmates, mutual attraction, and perfect partnerships. See what this romantic card reveals.
career_reading_single_en: Success currently relies on teamwork. Find a 'work spouse' or a partner who complements your skills—two heads are definitely better than one.
finance_reading_single_en: Financial harmony is achievable through shared goals. A joint investment or pooling resources with someone trustworthy works well right now.
self_reading_single_en: Be your own best friend. Treat yourself with the same kindness and compassion you offer to your favorite person to find true inner balance.
family_reading_single_en: Peace returns to the household. It is a great time to resolve conflicts, forgive, and bond deeply with family members.
travel_reading_single_en: A romantic getaway or a trip with a close friend will be unforgettable. The company matters much more than the destination.
health_reading_single_en: Emotional support often leads to a more vibrant sense of self. Consider finding a gentle wellness routine that feels like a treat rather than a chore.
self_past_en: You learned to accept your own flaws, perhaps through the eyes of someone who loved you unconditionally.
self_present_en: Treat yourself with the same love you give to your favorite human. Inner harmony is your superpower right now.
self_future_en: You will find a perfect balance between your heart and mind, leading to a profound sense of wholeness and peace.
family_past_en: A sibling or close relative was your anchor, providing a safe space and understanding when you needed it most.
family_present_en: Arguments fade away. It is a time of forgiveness and hugging it out. The vibe at home is inner rhythm-fectly peaceful.
family_future_en: Your family circle will strengthen, or perhaps welcome a new member or partner who brings joy and unity.
travel_past_en: A past trip with a partner brought you closer, creating shared memories that still warm your heart.
travel_present_en: Planning a getaway for two? Go for it! The journey will strengthen your bond more than the destination itself.
travel_future_en: You will embark on a journey to meet someone special or visit a place that feels like a second home.
health_past_en: In the past, you may have noticed how much your surroundings and relationships influenced your overall energy levels.
health_present_en: Focus on light movement and staying hydrated. If things feel heavy, a kind word or a soft conversation can do wonders for your spirit.
health_future_en: Cultivating inner peace will likely reflect in your physical vitality. A happy heart usually supports a steady and balanced pace of life.
celtic_cross_present_en: A beautiful dance of mutual respect and attraction is taking center stage. You are currently experiencing a moment of perfect alignment with another soul, where communication and chemistry feel effortless.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The pressure to remain in 'perfect sync' can become a burden, leading you to compromise your own needs to maintain the harmony. The challenge lies in the risk of losing your individual identity within the 'us.'
celtic_cross_above_en: You are consciously working toward a partnership or a balance between two opposing forces. You are focused on the ideal of cooperation, shared values, and making a commitment that feels fair to both sides.
celtic_cross_below_en: A deep, soul-level craving for companionship and mirror-reflection is the root of your current path. Subconsciously, you are seeking someone who can witness your true self and offer a safe harbor for your emotions.
celtic_cross_past_en: A recent meeting or a bridge built between hearts has led you to this point. You have recently stepped out of isolation and decided that sharing your journey is more rewarding than walking it alone.
celtic_cross_future_en: A deepening of a current bond is on the horizon, potentially moving toward a formal proposal, a contract, or a sacred promise. The connection is set to evolve into something more structured and stable.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are approaching the situation with an open hand and a willing heart, ready to meet someone halfway. You are prioritizing connection over ego and are genuinely interested in what the other party has to bring to the table.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The surrounding energy is one of invitation and mutual attraction; the 'room' is encouraging this union. External circumstances are aligning to bring two separate elements into a single, cohesive flow.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for a soulmate-level connection that transcends the mundane, but you fear the vulnerability required to sustain it. There’s a quiet dread of being rejected once the 'honeymoon phase' masks fall off.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you maintain this balance, the path leads to a powerful and healing union. This relationship—whether romantic, platonic, or professional—is likely to become a cornerstone of your emotional world.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Keep your individual cup full; a healthy union requires two whole people, not two halves trying to complete each other.

tarot_imply_en: celebration, friendship, joy, community, reunion
standalone_past_en: You shared joyful moments and laughter with your circle. Those memories of support and fun laid the foundation for your current happiness.
standalone_present_en: Cheers! It's time to gather your tribe and celebrate. The energy around you is social, lighthearted, and full of friendship. Don't be alone today.
standalone_future_en: A big celebration, wedding, or reunion is on the calendar. You will be surrounded by people who love you and cheer for your success.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past joys of friendship create a celebratory atmosphere now, leading to warm reunions and social support in the future.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you built strong emotional bonds through shared experiences or successful teamwork, establishing a supportive network that lifts you up.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, the energy is all about connection and celebration; open your heart to friends and enjoy the warmth of community around you today.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, expect a joyful gathering or a significant milestone where you will feel deeply supported, celebrated, and integrated into a loving circle.
love_reading_single_en: If you are single, this is a prime time to socialize; you may meet someone special through mutual friends or at a festive gathering.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship is entering a phase of lightness and shared joy; attending events together or hosting friends will strengthen your bond.
love_past_en: Love started from friendship, or you met someone special on a group date.
love_present_en: Love is fun and companionable. You might introduce your partner to friends or party together.
love_future_en: Marriage is possible, or the relationship will integrate into each other's families and social circles.
career_past_en: You worked in a highly compatible team or celebrated a project closing.
career_present_en: Friendly workplace atmosphere; colleagues are helpful, and you enjoy working together.
career_future_en: Team success awaits; there will be celebrations for sales or collective progress.
finance_past_en: You spent money on partying or treating friends.
finance_present_en: Expenses for entertainment and socializing, but it brings joy and emotional value.
finance_future_en: Prepare budget for social gifts/events, or luck may come from acquaintances.
action_prompt_en: Call your best friend and meet up now! Share good stories and recharge each other.
reflection_question_en: Who is the true friend you can laugh and cry with in any situation?
affirmation_en: I am surrounded by good friendship and sincere love.
hook_en: No one can thrive without a group... time to go find your friends!
ritual_2min_en: Invite friends over or text them appreciation. Tell them they matter. Expressing gratitude attracts more joy.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What is your funniest memory with friends?
What do you want to throw a party for soon?
What does friendship mean to your life?
keywords_light: celebration, friendship, community, joy, gathering
keywords_shadow: overindulgence, gossip, exclusion, partying too much, shallow relationships
image_alt_en: Three happy cats dancing in a circle with raised cups, surrounded by harvest fruits and flowers, celebrating together.
illustration_prompt_en: Three joyful cats (calico, tabby, white) dancing on hind legs in a circle, raising golden cups in a toast, surrounded by pumpkins, grapes and flowers, harvest festival vibe, art nouveau style, warm colors.
meta_description_en: Three of Cups Tarot meaning by MeowTarot: Celebrate friendship, community, and joy. Discover what this social card reveals for you.
career_reading_single_en: Collaboration is your superpower right now. Working happily with a team or networking at social events will open doors. Don't be a lone wolf; the pack brings success.
finance_reading_single_en: You might spend money on parties, gifts, or socializing, but it's an investment in happiness and connections. Pooling resources with trusted friends could also be beneficial.
self_reading_single_en: Your soul is nourished by connection. Stop hiding in your cave; your sparkle returns when you are surrounded by people who love and accept you.
family_reading_single_en: A joyful family reunion, a birth, or a wedding is highlighted. It is a time of harmony where cousins and relatives come together to share good news.
travel_reading_single_en: A group trip, a girls' night out, or traveling to a festival is on the cards. The journey will be filled with laughter, photos, and shared memories.
health_reading_single_en: Laughter and joy are wonderful for your inner glow. Connecting with others can help lift your overall energy and keep things feeling light.
self_past_en: You found your 'tribe' or a community where you felt you truly belonged, which healed past loneliness.
self_present_en: You are radiant and sociable, enjoying the spotlight of your circle. It's a time to celebrate who you are with others.
self_future_en: You will feel deeply integrated and supported by a loving community, never having to walk alone.
family_past_en: Happy childhood memories of holidays or large family gatherings that provided a sense of security.
family_present_en: Celebrating a family milestone, like a birthday or reunion. The vibe is harmonious and festive.
family_future_en: Expansion of the family circle is likely, whether through marriage, new babies, or welcoming in-laws.
travel_past_en: A memorable trip with friends that bonded you closer together.
travel_present_en: Packing bags for a party destination, a wedding, or a fun group excursion.
travel_future_en: You will attend a celebration far from home, combining travel with a joyful social event.
health_past_en: Being part of a community or group activities helped you maintain a sense of balance and vitality.
health_present_en: Socializing is a great mood booster, though it is always nice to check in with your body's limits during festive moments.
health_future_en: Holistic well-being comes from emotional balance and happy relationships. Your heart will feel lighter.
celtic_cross_present_en: Life feels like a celebratory brunch with your favorite kindred spirits. You are currently in an uplifting cycle of community, shared joy, and gratitude for the people who truly 'get' you.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The social buzz can become a distraction, leading to surface-level interactions that avoid deeper, necessary truths. The challenge is keeping your focus when the party energy makes it tempting to gloss over real issues.
celtic_cross_above_en: You are consciously seeking a sense of belonging and public validation for your achievements. You want to share your success with a crowd and are looking for ways to foster harmony within your social or professional circles.
celtic_cross_below_en: At your core, there is a primal need to be part of a 'tribe' and to feel supported by a collective. This situation is driven by an instinctive desire for the safety and vitality found in group dynamics.
celtic_cross_past_en: A recent shared success or a gathering of friends has provided the emotional momentum you're currently riding. You’ve recently experienced the power of collaboration and the warmth of genuine support.
celtic_cross_future_en: An invitation to celebrate or a significant social milestone is approaching. Expect your network to expand or your existing bonds to be strengthened through a joyous, shared event.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are acting as the 'glue' right now—enthusiastic, social, and ready to cheer others on. You are finding your strength through connection and are likely the one organizing the fun or bringing people together.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The atmosphere is festive, collaborative, and rich with feminine or creative energy. Your external world is currently mirroring your inner joy, offering plenty of opportunities for collaboration and fun.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for lasting friendship and unconditional group support, but you fear 'three’s a crowd' dynamics or being excluded from the inner circle. There’s a worry that the fun is only skin-deep.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you keep nurturing these bonds, the situation will culminate in a shared victory or a lasting sense of community. This path leads to a life that feels socially rich and emotionally supported.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Enjoy the party, but don't forget to address the dishes—ensure that the practical foundations of your relationships are as solid as the laughter.

tarot_imply_en: boredom, discontent, missed opportunity, contemplation, apathy
standalone_past_en: You felt disconnected and unsatisfied, perhaps rejecting offers because they weren't 'perfect.' You were stuck looking at what was missing.
standalone_present_en: You are sitting with your arms crossed, feeling uninspired by everything. Look up—there is a fourth cup, a hidden opportunity, being offered to you right now.
standalone_future_en: If you stay in this mood, you'll miss the boat. But if you open your eyes to unexpected options, life will surprise you with something better than you planned.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past dissatisfaction has led to present withdrawal. However, a new opportunity awaits your grasp. Simply shifting your perspective will instantly brighten your future.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you were stuck in a cycle of dissatisfaction, likely turning down perfectly good offers because they didn't match your exact expectations.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now you are feeling uninspired and withdrawn, but be careful not to let this apathy blind you to a valuable opportunity being presented to you today.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, life will offer you a fresh start or surprise gift; if you can shift your perspective and say yes, things will improve significantly.
love_past_en: You rejected good suitors while waiting for 'the one', or felt bored in a previous relationship.
love_present_en: Singles are too picky; couples feel the relationship has gone stale and lost its spark.
love_future_en: You might regret it later if you play hard to get or overlook a good love that is close by.
love_reading_single_en: If you are single, you may be dismissing potential partners too quickly because they aren't 'perfect'; try giving someone a chance before saying no.
love_reading_couple_en: If you are in a relationship, things may feel stagnant or routine right now; instead of withdrawing, try to actively reconnect and appreciate what you have built.
career_past_en: You turned down a job or opportunity thinking it wasn't good enough, or felt burned out.
career_present_en: Totally bored with work! Feeling stuck in a rut, uninspired, wanting to quit but hesitant.
career_future_en: A new opportunity will arrive, possibly in an unexpected form. Don't reject it immediately; consider it first.
finance_past_en: Overlooked small income streams because you were hoping for a get-rich-quick scheme.
finance_present_en: Dissatisfied with current income but not actively striving to earn more.
finance_future_en: You might miss a good investment opportunity due to hesitation or sticking to old ways.
action_prompt_en: Stop staring at empty cups! Look at the full ones and be grateful for what you have right now.
reflection_question_en: What opportunity is floating right in front of you that you are pretending not to see?
affirmation_en: I open my heart to the gifts and opportunities the universe offers.
hook_en: Bored of the same old same old options? Look closely, there might be a something good right behind you.
ritual_2min_en: Meditate for 2 minutes. Imagine a hand offering you a large gift box. Accept it and open it (in your mind) to train your spirit to receive opportunities.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
What are 3 things you have but forget to appreciate?
Why do you feel bored with the current situation?
If you said 'yes' to an incoming opportunity, how would life change?
keywords_light: contemplation, re-evaluation, meditation, introspection, stability
keywords_shadow: boredom, apathy, missed opportunities, depression, discontent
image_alt_en: A bored cat sitting under a tree with crossed arms (paws), ignoring three cups on the ground and a fourth cup being offered by a cloud hand.
illustration_prompt_en: A sulky grey cat sitting under a tree with crossed paws, looking away from three golden cups on the grass, ignoring a fourth cup being offered by a mystical hand from a cloud, serene but stagnant atmosphere, art nouveau style.
meta_description_en: Four of Cups Tarot meaning by MeowTarot: Overcome boredom and apathy. Don't miss the new opportunities waiting right in front of you.
career_reading_single_en: You may feel uninspired by your current tasks, as if you are someone bored with the same old toy. Don't let this apathy make you miss a hidden opportunity; a new project might be better than it looks.
finance_reading_single_en: You might be ignoring small financial gains because you are waiting for a big win. Pay attention to what you have; even small coins can fill the bowl if you appreciate them.
self_reading_single_en: You are in a 'meh' mood, feeling a bit disconnected from everything. It is okay to withdraw into your box for a while, but don't stay there so long that you forget how to play.
family_reading_single_en: You might be withdrawing from family gatherings or feeling misunderstood. Try not to sulk in the corner; loved ones are likely trying to offer you support, even if they are clumsy about it.
travel_reading_single_en: You really don't feel like going anywhere right now. While staying home feels safe, a change of scenery—even a small one—might be exactly what you need to cure the blues.
health_reading_single_en: You might feel a bit low on energy lately, as if you are someone who just wants to stay in their favorite box. Gentle movement or simply stretching when you feel ready can help lift your spirits.
self_past_en: In the past, you retreated into your shell to process emotions or recover from disappointment.
self_present_en: Currently, you are feeling numb or indifferent, preferring to observe rather than participate.
self_future_en: You will soon wake up from this emotional slumber and find a new spark that excites you again.
family_past_en: You felt disconnected from your family or chose to skip family events due to lack of interest.
family_present_en: You are keeping your distance, perhaps ignoring calls or messages from relatives right now.
family_future_en: A reconciliation or a new understanding will bridge the gap, bringing you back to the fold.
travel_past_en: You cancelled a trip or felt disappointed by a vacation that didn't meet your expectations.
travel_present_en: You have zero desire to travel; staying in your comfort zone seems much more appealing.
travel_future_en: An unexpected invitation to travel will come your way; say yes, it will break your routine.
health_past_en: In the past, your energy might have felt a bit slow or uninspired, leading to more time spent resting than usual.
health_present_en: Currently, you may feel a bit disconnected from your physical needs. Checking in with how you feel and prioritizing rest might be beneficial right now.
health_future_en: A bit of motivation may soon return, inviting you to find gentle ways to recharge and feel more balanced.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are currently sitting in a state of emotional plateau, feeling slightly detached or uninspired by the options laid out before you.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is your own selective blindness; by focusing so hard on what feels 'meh,' you risk ignoring a unique gift being offered from a completely different direction.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are looking for a deeper meaning or a 'missing piece' that makes life feel vibrant again.
celtic_cross_below_en: Underneath it all, there is a protective instinct to withdraw, perhaps because your emotional cup has been overstimulated or depleted recently.
celtic_cross_past_en: A period of overindulgence or repetitive cycles has led you to this current state of apathy.
celtic_cross_future_en: The coming energy suggests a period of quiet meditation and necessary solitude before any new movement happens.
celtic_cross_self_en: You see yourself as someone who needs a break from the noise, perhaps acting a bit aloof or hard to please right now.
celtic_cross_environment_en: Your surroundings offer plenty of opportunities, but they feel generic or mismatched with your current mood.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope for a sign that truly excites you, yet you fear that you’ve lost the ability to feel genuinely satisfied.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you continue this introspection, you will eventually reach a point of clarity where you can finally see the gift you’ve been ignoring.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Uncross your hands and look up; the solution isn't in the three cups you've already rejected.

tarot_imply_en: Tyranny, Impulsiveness, High expectations, Ruthlessness, Domineering
standalone_past_en: You tried to rule with an iron fist, or perhaps you let your anger make decisions for you. That impulsive leadership style likely burned bridges you needed.
standalone_present_en: Watch your temper. You are trying to force things to happen your way, acting like a tyrant rather than a leader. People stop listening when you start shouting.
standalone_future_en: If you continue to be rigid and aggressive, you will find yourself standing alone. Leadership requires respect, not fear. Soften your approach before you lose your support.
reading_summary_preview_en: Overly aggressive use of power in the past is backfiring now. Without adopting a more flexible attitude, you risk losing respect and acceptance in the future.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you may have let your temper or ego drive your decisions, creating friction or damage that you are still dealing with today.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now, you are at risk of being too domineering or impatient; try to cool your temper and listen to others before you push them away.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, if you continue to rule with an iron fist, you will face isolation; softening your approach is the only way to maintain true respect.
love_past_en: You dated an angry, controlling person, or you acted like your partner's owner until they fled.
love_present_en: Tension is high because one partner tries to control everything. Beware of explosive arguments and hurtful words.
love_future_en: Without compromise, the relationship won't survive, or you'll end up tolerating an aggressive partner.
love_reading_single_en: You might be attracting domineering partners or inadvertently scaring others off with too much intensity; take a step back and let connections breathe.
love_reading_couple_en: Tension is rising due to a battle for control or hot tempers; step back from the need to be 'right' to prevent hurtful arguments from damaging your bond.
career_past_en: You failed due to overconfidence or clashed with authority figures at work.
career_present_en: A hot-tempered boss, or you are mismanaging by ignoring your team. Beware of taking excessive risks.
career_future_en: You might be demoted or lose executive power if you stubbornly follow your whims without checking the facts.
finance_past_en: Lost a large sum due to haste, or invested in something you didn't truly understand.
finance_present_en: Beware of spending to satisfy cravings or show off. Finances might stumble due to poor planning.
finance_future_en: Conflicts over interests may arise, or you could be cheated by a partner due to misplaced trust.
action_prompt_en: Lower your voice! Listen more, command less, and stop making everything about you.
reflection_question_en: Are you leading others with 'vision' or with the 'fear' you create?
affirmation_en: I am a leader who listens and understands the feelings of others.
hook_en: An unloved king... is just a grumpy old man on an empty throne.
ritual_2min_en: Write the names of people you've wronged or are angry with. Write an apology or forgiveness next to them to lower your ego.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
When was the last time you admitted you were wrong?
What expectations are you placing on others that suffocate them?
How do you release anger without hurting anyone?
keywords_light: Compassionate leadership, Listening, Patience, Humility, Collaboration
keywords_shadow: Tyrant, Impulsive, Arrogant, Bully, Unrealistic expectations
image_alt_en: A grumpy lion-like cat sitting on a throne, pointing a wand aggressively, with subjects cowering away in fear.
illustration_prompt_en: A grumpy ginger lion-cat sitting slouched on a throne, pointing a wooden wand aggressively at cowering mice subjects, stormy red and black background, atmosphere of tyranny, art nouveau style, harsh lighting --ar 2:3
meta_description_en: King of Wands Reversed tarot meaning: Tyranny, impulsiveness, and high expectations. Learn to lead with humility and avoid arrogance.
career_reading_single_en: You might be clashing with a stubborn authority figure or feeling frustrated by a lack of direction; try to lead with soft hands rather than sharp defenses to regain respect.
finance_reading_single_en: Impulsive spending or a 'get rich quick' mindset could lead to a minor tumble; take a moment to groom your budget and avoid risky leaps for now.
self_reading_single_en: Your inner fire might be feeling a bit smoky or overwhelming; give yourself permission to rest and find your rhythm again without needing to be in control.
family_reading_single_en: A 'bossy person' dynamic might be causing tension at home; a little bit of listening and a gentle nudge will work much better than a loud roar.
travel_reading_single_en: Travel plans could be hampered by someone's rigid attitude or a short temper; stay flexible and remember that the journey is about the view, not just the destination.
health_reading_single_en: Your energy levels might feel a bit erratic; consider focusing on gentle movement, cooling sips of water, and finding a quiet sunny spot to recharge your spirit.
self_past_en: You may have struggled with maintaining your cool or felt like you had to dominate every situation to feel safe.
self_present_en: Right now, you might be pushing yourself too hard; it’s okay to step off the throne and just be a cozy person for a while.
self_future_en: You are moving toward a time where you will learn to channel your passion more constructively, leading with warmth instead of pressure.
family_past_en: There might have been a period of loud disagreements or a struggle for power within your inner circle.
family_present_en: Focus on softening your approach with loved ones today; a gentle head-bump is more effective than a sharp get defensive.
family_future_en: The household energy will calm down as you learn to lead with patience and create a space where everyone feels heard.
travel_past_en: A past trip might have felt stressful due to over-planning or someone trying to control every single minute.
travel_present_en: If traveling now, try to pack a patient heart and be prepared for minor delays caused by others' mistakes.
travel_future_en: Future adventures will be much more rewarding when you allow room for spontaneity and collective decision-making.
health_past_en: You may have experienced burnout or felt your 'inner battery' draining from being constantly on high alert.
health_present_en: Your body might appreciate a slower pace today; consider extra hydration and some deep, calming breaths to soothe your nerves.
health_future_en: By listening to your body's early signals, you'll find a steady rhythm that keeps your vitality glowing brightly and safely.
celtic_cross_present_en: A misuse of power or a total lack of vision is stalling progress; authority is being felt as a burden or a tool for ego rather than guidance.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: The challenge is a rigid, 'my way or the highway' mentality that is alienating potential allies and clouding judgment.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Step off the throne and listen to the feedback you've been ignoring before you lose your influence entirely.
celtic_cross_above_en: You are consciously preoccupied with maintaining control or enforcing your will, even if the methods are becoming increasingly ineffective.
celtic_cross_below_en: Subconsciously, there is a deep insecurity about your ability to lead, leading to overcompensation through aggression or unrealistic demands.
celtic_cross_past_en: A situation where you took charge too forcefully has created a lingering atmosphere of resentment or missed details.
celtic_cross_future_en: A reality check regarding your leadership style is imminent; you may find that people simply stop following your lead.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are behaving like a grumpy old tomcat—demanding respect without providing the protection or inspiration that earns it.
celtic_cross_environment_en: The surroundings are defined by a lack of inspiration or a culture of fear where no one dares to challenge a bad idea.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope to be the ultimate authority, yet you fear being exposed as someone who doesn't actually know the way forward.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: Without a significant shift toward humility and collaboration, your influence is likely to crumble under the weight of its own arrogance.

tarot_imply_en: Heartbreak, Blocked emotions, Moodiness, Emptiness, Unrequited love
standalone_past_en: Your heart was broken or heavily suppressed. You learned to cap your emotions tightly to avoid getting hurt again, leaving you feeling a bit numb.
standalone_present_en: Your cup feels empty today. You might be blocking your own feelings or rejecting love that is being offered. It's okay to not be okay, but don't shut the door completely.
standalone_future_en: Staying emotionally blocked will only lead to a lingering sense of emptiness. You need to let the tears flow or speak your truth to clear the blockage and let love back in.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past pain has built a wall around your emotions today. Without releasing pent-up feelings, the future risks loneliness and emotional barrenness.
reading_summary_past_en: In the past, you suffered a deep emotional wound or repressed your true feelings, causing you to close your heart out of self-protection.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now your emotions are spilling over or feeling completely drained; you might be pushing away support because you feel overwhelmed.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, if you don't release this pain, you risk ongoing emptiness; gentle healing is essential to avoid missing future joy.
love_reading_single_en: You may feel emotionally unavailable or stuck on a past hurt; focus on refilling your own cup before trying to pour into someone new.
love_reading_couple_en: You or your partner may be feeling emotionally disconnected or drained; avoid letting unspoken resentments spill over into unnecessary conflict.
love_past_en: Unrequited love, or a relationship that ended in tears and misunderstanding.
love_present_en: Feeling out of love, indifferent, or grieving a disappointment. Beware of emotional tantrums.
love_future_en: Heart healing will take time, or you must accept that the person you're talking to is 'not the one'.
career_past_en: You worked a job you hated or lost the spark for creative work.
career_present_en: Bored, unmotivated, or feeling that your work offers zero spiritual fulfillment.
career_future_en: Creative block; ideas won't flow. You might need to seek inspiration elsewhere.
finance_past_en: Lost money out of pity or was scammed by a sob story.
finance_present_en: Financial stress is affecting your mood, or you're emotional spending.
finance_future_en: Expect disappointment regarding expected funds, or financial aid may be delayed.
action_prompt_en: Don't hold back tears! Cry it out, then wash your face. Releasing emotions is the best therapy.

finance_future_en: Prioritize your spending, or your money will dissolve like sugar in water.
action_prompt_en: Wake up! Stop fantasizing and face reality. Choose the most tangible option and act on it.
reflection_question_en: Is what you are chasing a true desire or just an illusion?
affirmation_en: I see the truth through illusions and choose the best for myself.
hook_en: The safe choice or the glittering prize? Choose wisely; some options aren't meant for you!
ritual_2min_en: List everything you want to do. Cross out the unrealistic ones one by one until only the most important one remains. Focus on that.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
If you had one wish, what would it be?
Are you deceiving yourself about anything?
Which goal should you 'drop' to lighten your life?
keywords_light: imagination, visualization, choices, dreams, possibilities
keywords_shadow: illusion, deception, unrealistic expectations, overwhelmed, lack of focus

career_reading_single_en: You have a pile of brilliant ideas, but chasing every possibility catches none. Pick one promising project and stick to it, rather than just dreaming about the results.
finance_reading_single_en: Not everything that glitters is a golden reward. Be wary of 'magical' investments or impulse buys that look too good to be true; keep your hands on your wallet.
self_reading_single_en: Living in a cloud castle is cozy, but real life is happening down here. It is time to stop wishing for a different reality and start creating it.
family_reading_single_en: You might be idealizing how your family 'should' be versus how they are. Let go of the storybook fantasy and appreciate the perfectly imperfect clan you have.
travel_reading_single_en: You want to be everywhere at once! Browsing travel apps is fun, but you can't book ten trips. Focus on one destination that truly calls to your spirit.
health_reading_single_en: It's easy to feel overwhelmed by shifting wellness trends. Focus on simple, grounding habits like staying hydrated and getting enough rest.
self_past_en: You spent a lot of time in your own head, building fantasies that protected you but kept you from growing.
self_present_en: You are currently overwhelmed by possibilities and 'what-ifs'. It is time to clear the fog and find your focus.
self_future_en: Once you pop the illusion bubbles, you will find a clear, solid path that brings real satisfaction, not just temporary thrills.
family_past_en: You viewed family matters through rose-colored glasses, perhaps ignoring red flags to keep the peace.
family_present_en: Confusion reigns; you aren't sure whose advice to trust. Everyone seems to be offering a different shiny solution.
family_future_en: The fog will lift, and you will see your family dynamics clearly, allowing for honest and grounded relationships.
travel_past_en: You dreamed of many adventures but rarely packed your bags. The journey was mostly in your mind.
travel_present_en: Too many destinations! You are paralyzed by choice. Remember, even a small trip is better than a perfect imaginary one.
travel_future_en: You will finally commit to one journey that aligns with your soul, turning a long-held dream into a ticket and a passport stamp.
health_past_en: You may have spent energy looking for quick wellness solutions in the past. It was a period of learning what truly helps you feel balanced.
health_present_en: Too much information can feel a bit draining right now. Try to quiet the noise and check in with your body's simple, everyday needs.
health_future_en: You are moving toward a stable routine that feels right for you. Finding your own pace will help maintain a gentle sense of well-being.
celtic_cross_present_en: You are currently navigating a shimmering fog of possibilities, where your imagination is working overtime and every path looks equally tempting.
celtic_cross_challenge_en: Your biggest hurdle is 'analysis paralysis'—you are so busy chasing shiny mirages that you are failing to commit to anything concrete in the real world.
celtic_cross_above_en: Consciously, you are looking for the 'perfect' choice, dreaming of a scenario where you can have it all without any trade-offs.
celtic_cross_below_en: Underneath, a fear of missing out or making a 'wrong' permanent choice is fueling your desire to keep every door open indefinitely.
celtic_cross_past_en: A recent period of intense brainstorming or idealism has brought you to this crossroads of multiple, conflicting desires.
celtic_cross_future_en: The mist will soon begin to thin, forcing you to distinguish between what is a fleeting fantasy and what is a sustainable reality.
celtic_cross_self_en: You are showing up as the dreamer, perhaps a bit distracted, captivated by the 'what-ifs' rather than the 'what-is.'
celtic_cross_environment_en: The world around you is full of distractions, flashy offers, or voices that only add to your internal sense of confusion.
celtic_cross_hopes_fears_en: You hope to find a magical solution that hits every mark, but you fear that once you choose, all the other beautiful options will vanish.
celtic_cross_outcome_en: If you continue without grounding, you may end up with many ideas but no results; clarity will only come through the courage to let go of the illusions.
celtic_cross_challenge_advice_en: Pick one cup that has the most weight, even if it’s less flashy, and ignore the rest for a while.

tarot_imply_en: Waking up, Making a choice, Clarity, End of illusion, Reality check
standalone_past_en: You were lost in a fog of too many choices and daydreams, unable to pick a direction. But that confusion is fading, and you are finally seeing things as they really are.
standalone_present_en: Stop scrolling through options and pick one. Reality is calling you to focus on what is tangible and actionable right now. Clear the clutter and commit to a single path.
standalone_future_en: Once you commit to your choice, the hesitation will vanish. You will turn your dreams into reality through hard work and focus, rather than just wishing for them.
reading_summary_preview_en: Past confusion is ending. Present awakening helps you filter out illusions, guiding your life toward a clear and realistic direction in the future.
reading_summary_past_en: Previously, you were caught in a fog of confusion or overwhelmed by too many shiny options, unable to distinguish between genuine opportunities and mere fantasies.
reading_summary_present_en: Right now reality is hitting you, urging you to stop daydreaming and make a concrete choice; the time for browsing is over and you must pick what is truly actionable.
reading_summary_future_en: Going forward, as the illusions fade, you will find a clear path; sticking to this newfound clarity allows you to build something real rather than chasing impossible dreams.
love_past_en: Disappointed by unrealistic expectations, or broke up after finally seeing the incompatibility clearly.
love_present_en: Stopped kidding yourself that they love you. Moving on from the wrong person or finally being clear in the relationship. No more ambiguity.
love_future_en: You will find a love grounded in reality, tangible and more stable than chasing fantasies.
love_reading_single_en: You are finally seeing things clearly, realizing which crushes were just fantasies; it is time to drop unrealistic expectations and look for a partner who offers genuine consistency.
love_reading_couple_en: Your relationship needs a dose of reality; stop ignoring red flags or glossing over issues, as honest communication now will replace confusion with a much stronger, tangible bond.
career_past_en: Changed jobs often not knowing what you liked, or failed from a pipe-dream project.
career_present_en: Priorities set! You know what to focus on and what to drop. Stopped being scattered and focused on what actually makes money.
career_future_en: Goals are clearer. Success will come from planned action, not waiting for luck.
finance_past_en: Almost fell for an investment scam, or woke up to your wasteful spending habits.
finance_present_en: Back to serious budgeting. Stopped buying nonsense and looking for safe, stable investments.
finance_future_en: Financial status will improve due to prudence and staying grounded in reality.
action_prompt_en: Pick one! Don't be greedy. Grab the best piece of fish in front of you and eat it before it slips away.
reflection_question_en: Are you ready to trade a beautiful fantasy for a reality that might not be perfect but is real?
affirmation_en: I am clear on my goals and determined to achieve them.
hook_en: Wake up! The sun is shining on your bum. Stop dreaming and get to work.
ritual_2min_en: Splash your face with ice-cold water! Look in the mirror and say 'I am awake' 3 times to snap your mind back to the present.
journal_prompt_3lines_en:
Which fantasy should you stop obsessing over?
What truth have you recently accepted about yourself?
What is the one goal you will focus on this month?
keywords_light: Clarity, Decision making, Reality check, Focus, Prioritizing
keywords_shadow: Disillusionment, Harsh reality, Missed opportunities, Regret, Confusion clearing
image_alt_en: A cat batting away the cloudy cups, choosing a real bowl of food on the ground, with the illusions fading into mist.
